tmdb_overview_en: A 40-something disillusioned novelist, Yazoe, haunted by a failed marriage and a crippling personal secret, navigates hollow affairs with a courtesan named Chieko while projecting his emotional void onto the protagonists of his love novels—until an accidental encounter with a naive college student, Noriko Seyawa, unravels his guarded solitude, forcing him to confront his fear of intimacy and the buried trauma shaping his twisted philosophy on love.

director: 伊爾蒂蔻恩伊達 Ildiko Enyedi
synopsis: France/China | Color | Germany | 147min | C/E Subtitles | 輔12 威尼斯影展國際影評人費比西獎、馬斯楚安尼獎等六項大獎 芝加哥國際影展 銀雨果獎最佳攝影獎 Silver Spike國際影展銀穗獎與綠穗獎 里斯本影展 評審團特別獎 永河畔拉羅什國際影展 評審團大獎 奧斯滕德影展 最佳影片大獎 坎城影帝 梁朝偉 ╳ 法國影后 蕾雅瑟杜（Léa Seydoux） 一棵銀杏樹，三個世代的百年風華 德國一座中世紀大學城的植物園中，一棵古老的銀杏樹靜靜矗立著。這個沉默的見證者，見證著三個時代中、人們與自然之間的深層聯結。 故事始於1908年。才華橫溢的女學生格蕾特（露娜維德勒 飾）帶著科學熱忱，在那個科學界由男性主導的年代，她試圖衝破性別枷鎖，透過植物攝影發現銀杏樹隱藏在微觀自然中的神聖規律。這棵銀杏樹也見證了女性與科學的覺醒。 時光流轉來到1972年，銀杏樹更加壯碩。性格孤僻的學生漢內斯（恩佐布魯姆 飾），為了愛情去照料一盆天竺葵，開始察覺植物也有其獨特的感知能力。這份對植物的感知與連結，除撫慰了他的孤獨，更改變了他對世界與自我關係的看法。 時序進入2020年，全球因疫情變得寂靜。神經科學家王教授（梁朝偉 飾）被困在空無一人的馬爾堡大學校園，與古老的銀杏樹產生了靈魂的共鳴。他在植物學家愛麗絲（蕾雅瑟杜 飾）啟發下，開始一場結合生命科學與植物感知的實驗，發現百年前格蕾特的女性影像與漢內斯對生命的感知，都如同年輪般、封存在這棵樹的記憶裡。 三個不同時代的孤獨靈魂，在銀杏樹的葉落與光影中，完成一場跨時空交匯。他們在大自然的見證下，被大自然靜謐、永恆且神祕的力量所改變，進而省思了生命的意涵。 Set in the botanical garden of a medieval town in Germany. Three epochs, three personalities, three sometimes clumsy but sincere attempts to free themselves and to create links with the plants and the world of the garden. An encounter.
tmdb_overview: 德國某大學，一棵矗立在此好幾世紀的銀杏樹，靜靜地陪伴世間風景變換。1908年，第一個招收的女學生，在男性主宰的世界裡以攝影發掘了植物的奧祕。1972年．沉默的男孩與一株天竺葵之間，牽起了難以言說的連結。2020年，前來講學的香港神經學家為疫情所困，對銀杏樹展開奇想實驗。三組人物、三個篇章，跨越了時間與空間，在樹下織起了神祕且美麗的交會。
tmdb_overview_en: On the grounds of a medieval German university town looms an imposing Ginkgo biloba, a tree whose longevity stands in marked contrast to three intimate, human-scaled stories. In 1908, the university’s first female student gains admission into the prestigious botany department, confronting the sexism of both professors and peers. In 1972, amidst counterculture movements, a reserved student finds his attention captured by a fellow housemate and the geranium plant she studies. In 2020, during the COVID-19 pandemic, a neuroscientist from Hong Kong secures the help of a renowned botanist for an experiment on the old ginkgo tree.

tmdb_overview: 在南韓海邊小鎮束草，25歲的秀荷過著單調的生活，生活不外乎是探望經營魚販生意的母親、和男友俊昊的相處，直到法國男子楊科宏來到秀荷工作的民宿，她心中開始浮現對自我認同的疑問，以及對幾乎一無所知的法國父親的好奇，當冬季降臨小鎮，秀荷和楊科宏彼此觀察、試探，小心翼翼地編織起一段脆弱的連結。
tmdb_overview_en: In the snowy seaside town of Sokcho, 25-year-old Soo-Ha works at a guesthouse. She drifts between her mother’s fish stall and her boyfriend until a French artist’s arrival stirs questions about her identity. As winter deepens, Soo-Ha and the artist form an unspoken connection through food and art.

synopsis: 66歲的美子與16歲的孫子相依為命。然而隨著年齡增長，她逐漸察覺記憶開始出現問題，被診斷出早期阿茲海默症。就在此時，一起震驚社區的少女死亡事件，也讓原本平靜的生活蒙上一層陰影。某天，美子在社區文化中心看到一張「詩歌課程」的海報，抱著好奇與期待報名參加。老師鼓勵學生重新觀察世界，從花朵、風景與日常細節中發現詩意。於是，美子開始用不同的眼光凝視身邊的一切。然而，在尋找詩句的過程中，美子也逐漸被迫面對現實與人性的複雜。當記憶逐漸流逝，她試圖在破碎的生活中寫下屬於自己的詩，也重新思考：在這個並不完美的世界裡，人究竟該如何守住善良與尊嚴呢?
tmdb_overview: Crude Poetry is a film about language. It is a film about a deep wish to be understood. Set in the ruins of biblical Babel, a long-lost city which housed speakers of a so called ‘universal language’, two characters come together to make meaning, in this stop motion, live puppetry hybrid.
tmdb_overview_en: Crude Poetry is a film about language. It is a film about a deep wish to be understood. Set in the ruins of biblical Babel, a long-lost city which housed speakers of a so called ‘universal language’, two characters come together to make meaning, in this stop motion, live puppetry hybrid.

director: 伊爾蒂蔻恩伊達 Ildikó Enyedi
synopsis: ★榮獲威尼斯影展國際影評人費比西獎、馬斯楚安尼獎等六項大獎 德國一座中世紀大學城的植物園中，一棵古老的銀杏樹靜靜矗立著，見證著三個時代中人們與自然之間的深層聯結。故事始於1908年，女學生格蕾特帶著科學熱忱，透過植物攝影發現銀杏樹隱藏在微觀自然中的神聖規律…。1972年，性格孤僻的學生漢內斯，為了愛情去照料一盆天竺葵，開始察覺植物也有其獨特的感知能力…。2020年，因疫情神經科學家王教授被困在空無一人的校園，與古老的銀杏樹產生了靈魂的共鳴，開始一場結合生命科學與植物感知的實驗，發現百年前格蕾特的女性影像與漢內斯對生命的感知，都如同年輪般、封存在這棵樹的記憶裡……。
tmdb_overview: 德國某大學，一棵矗立在此好幾世紀的銀杏樹，靜靜地陪伴世間風景變換。1908年，第一個招收的女學生，在男性主宰的世界裡以攝影發掘了植物的奧祕。1972年．沉默的男孩與一株天竺葵之間，牽起了難以言說的連結。2020年，前來講學的香港神經學家為疫情所困，對銀杏樹展開奇想實驗。三組人物、三個篇章，跨越了時間與空間，在樹下織起了神祕且美麗的交會。
tmdb_overview_en: On the grounds of a medieval German university town looms an imposing Ginkgo biloba, a tree whose longevity stands in marked contrast to three intimate, human-scaled stories. In 1908, the university’s first female student gains admission into the prestigious botany department, confronting the sexism of both professors and peers. In 1972, amidst counterculture movements, a reserved student finds his attention captured by a fellow housemate and the geranium plant she studies. In 2020, during the COVID-19 pandemic, a neuroscientist from Hong Kong secures the help of a renowned botanist for an experiment on the old ginkgo tree.

movie_title_en: The Stars and Moon are Holes in The Sky
synopsis: 改編自吉行淳之介同名文學鉅作 小說家矢添克二（綾野剛 飾）自從被妻子拋棄後，十年來始終單身。某天，他偶然與大學時代的同學（柄本佑 飾）重逢，得知對方的女兒已經21歲，這才真切感受到歲月流逝。他偶爾也會召妓，試圖以妓女千枝子（田中麗奈 飾）填補離婚後心中的缺口，舔舐被妻子拋棄的傷痛。年過不惑卻依然在內心掙扎的矢添，將自己投射到筆下小說的主角A（綾野剛一人分飾兩角）身上，描寫A與小自己20歲的女大學生B子之間的戀情，藉此探索「精神戀愛的可能性」。某日，矢添在畫廊裡與女大學生瀨川紀子（咲耶 飾）命運般地相遇。開車送紀子回家的途中，因她一次「失態」的意外舉動，兩人發展出一段奇異的情事。對戀愛既憎恨又恐懼，卻又打從心底渴望被愛的矢添，是否還能再次正視一個女人呢……？
tmdb_title: The Stars and the Moon are Holes in the Sky
tmdb_title_en: The Stars and the Moon are Holes in the Sky
tmdb_overview: 1969年春天。失婚多年的小說家矢添，在黑白的昭和日常裡過著近乎透明的生活。除了吃飯與寫作，他只與妓女維持近乎供需交換的肉體往來。直到遇見率直的女大生紀子，曖昧迅速滋長。當身體的親密糾纏逐漸演變為心理攻防，矢添被迫直視自己對情感連結的恐懼，以及那個令他難以啟齒的祕密。
tmdb_overview_en: A 40-something disillusioned novelist, Yazoe, haunted by a failed marriage and a crippling personal secret, navigates hollow affairs with a courtesan named Chieko while projecting his emotional void onto the protagonists of his love novels—until an accidental encounter with a naive college student, Noriko Seyawa, unravels his guarded solitude, forcing him to confront his fear of intimacy and the buried trauma shaping his twisted philosophy on love.

synopsis: 奧斯卡提名波蘭名導揚科馬薩 全新心理驚悚懸疑力作！ 2025艾美獎最佳男主角史蒂芬葛拉翰 再次直擊人性深淵 19 歲的問題青少年湯米沉迷於毒品、派對與暴力，過著毫無節制的生活。某天深夜，他在一次失控的狂歡後與朋友走散，意外遭到陌生男子克里斯綁架，醒來時發現自己被囚禁在一棟偏僻郊區住宅的地下室。這個家庭由父親克里斯、性格詭譎的母親凱瑟琳，以及他們年幼的兒子所組成，他們聲稱想「拯救」湯米，透過一套扭曲而極端的方式，將這名失控的少年「重新教育」成一個「乖孩子」。
tmdb_overview: 英格蘭鄉間一座私人宅邸，雇主慈眉善目待人和氣，女主人雖然寡言，但他們的小孩卻很開朗。這裡只用環境友善的無毒清潔劑，手機在屋內則是違禁品。他們不介意來幫傭的女孩是非法移民，認識環境後，她被帶到地下室，介紹家裡的第四個成員：一位口出穢言，行為失控，被鐵鍊拴在牆上，等待「痊癒」的年輕男子。
tmdb_overview_en: Tommy, a volatile 19-year-old, revels in drugs, parties and violence. After getting separated from his friends on a drunken bender, he is abducted by a shadowy figure. He wakes to find himself imprisoned in the basement of a remote Yorkshire house, inhabited by a very strange family. But what unfolds is not what he could possibly expect.

movie_title: 讓建築歌唱～徐亞英的交響人生
movie_title_en: Tuning Architecture:The Life of Albert Xu in Sound
synopsis: 華裔建築聲學大師徐亞英長年與貝聿銘、法蘭克蓋瑞等多位普立茲克獎得主的建築大師合作，以隱形的聲學設計著稱，在世界各地設計和建造了近百座文化演出和藝術展覽性建築，而他晚年的集大成之作就在台灣的衛武營國家藝術文化中心，更是他最滿意之作。建築聲學是物理、音樂、建築及科學的總合，聲學家賦予音樂穿梭於經過設計的空間，讓美好的樂音能感動人心。我們跟隨著徐老師清瘦而穩健的步伐，重回他最具代表性的作品，如羅浮宮金字塔、盧森堡愛樂音樂廳等，娓娓道來他如何為建築師解決問題，成為波宗巴克口中的「Why not」先生……。
tmdb_title: Tuning Architecture: The Life of Albert Xu in Sound
tmdb_title_en: Tuning Architecture: The Life of Albert Xu in Sound
tmdb_title_local: 讓建築歌唱～徐亞英的交響人生
tmdb_original_title: 讓建築歌唱～徐亞英的交響人生
tmdb_overview: 華裔建築聲學大師徐亞英長年與貝聿銘、法蘭克蓋瑞等多位普立茲克獎得主的建築大師合作，以隱形的聲學設計著稱，在世界各地設計和建造了近百座文化演出和藝術展覽性建築，而他晚年的集大成之作就在台灣的衛武營國家藝術文化中心，更是他最滿意之作。建築聲學是物理、音樂、建築及科學的總合，聲學家賦予音樂穿梭於經過設計的空間，讓美好的樂音能感動人心。我們跟隨著徐老師清瘦而穩健的步伐，重回他最具代表性的作品，如羅浮宮金字塔、盧森堡愛樂音樂廳等，娓娓道來他如何為建築師解決問題，成爲波宗巴克口中的『Why not』先生。他對聲學的熱情也驅使他不辭勞苦地奔波於每個設計案工地，投入一甲子的光陰追求聲音美學與空間和諧。
synopsis_en:
Renowned Chinese-American architectural acoustics master Xu Yaying spent decades collaborating with Pritzker Prize-winning legends such as I.M. Pei and Frank Gehry. Celebrated for his "invisible" acoustic designs, Xu contributed to the design and construction of nearly a hundred cultural and artistic venues worldwide. His late-career magnum opus—and the project he takes the most pride in—is Taiwan’s National Kaohsiung Center for the Arts (Weiwuying).

Architectural acoustics is a synthesis of physics, music, architecture, and science. An acoustician enables music to flow through a meticulously designed space, ensuring that beautiful melodies can truly move the human heart. Following Xu’s lean yet steady footsteps, we revisit his most iconic masterpieces, including the Louvre Pyramid and the Philharmonie Luxembourg. He recounts his journey of solving complex challenges for architects, revealing how he earned the nickname "Mr. Why Not" from Christian de Portzamparc.

synopsis: 日本影史傳奇人物、《鐵道員》攝影大師木村大作35毫米膠捲質感非大銀幕不可 被踢出幫派的黑道大哥三浦，在漁村過著勉強度日的討海人生，卻意外與港邊被捉弄的失明男孩幸太成了忘年之交。隱瞞身分的他，是幸太悲慘童年的希望；為了讓幸太重見光明，三浦鋌而走險，當男孩終於得到了「光」，男人卻自此失去了蹤跡。十數年過去，重逢近在眼前，但逃不掉的過去還是重新找上三浦，他再次拿起手槍，只為了守護比自己更重要的人……。
tmdb_overview: 被踢出幫派的黑道大哥三浦，在漁村過著勉強度日的討海人生，卻意外與港邊被捉弄的失明男孩幸太成了忘年之交。隱瞞身分的他，是幸太悲慘童年的希望；為了讓幸太重見光明，三浦鋌而走險，當男孩終於得到了「光」，男人卻自此失去了蹤跡。十數年過去，重逢近在眼前，但逃不掉的過去還是重新找上三浦，他再次拿起手槍，只為了守護比自己更重要的人。
tmdb_overview_en: Miura, an aging ex-yakuza, develops an unexpected bond with Kota, a blind orphan. As they grow closer like family, Miura learns that Kota's sight can be restored with surgery. Determined to help, he steals money from his former yakuza group and leaves it for Kota before turning himself in. 12 years later, Miura is released from prison. Upon learning this, the yakuza plans to kill both Miura and Kota. Miura sacrifices himself to protect Kota, and...

movie_title_en: Palimpsest: The Story Of A Name
synopsis: ★2025金馬獎最佳紀錄片、剪輯 資深剪輯師雪美蓮，總納悶自己到底姓史蒂芬，還是姓雪、姓陳？明明亞洲臉，又非混血，怎取洋人姓？一查不得了，父親竟來自澳洲！母親曾有文學夢，似還牽涉吳爾芙姪子的中國戀情？她化身偵探親自執導，翻找父親傳記、家庭電影、老照片，以「史蒂芬」為圓心，拼出一幅與世紀風雲、名人交織的私密家族史，追問殖民與身分認同。血緣纏如網，個體仍能重寫自我，乘故事翱翔。
tmdb_title: Palimpsest: the Story of a Name
tmdb_title_en: Palimpsest: the Story of a Name

tmdb_overview_en: Veteran filmmaker Mary Stephen digs into her own family past to uncover the long-hidden origins of her Western surname, revealing a story of culture shock, colonialism, and contested remembrance.

director: 伊爾蒂蔻恩伊達 Ildiko Enyedi
synopsis: France/China | Color | Germany | 147min | C/E Subtitles | 輔12 威尼斯影展國際影評人費比西獎、馬斯楚安尼獎等六項大獎 芝加哥國際影展 銀雨果獎最佳攝影獎 Silver Spike國際影展銀穗獎與綠穗獎 里斯本影展 評審團特別獎 永河畔拉羅什國際影展 評審團大獎 奧斯滕德影展 最佳影片大獎 坎城影帝 梁朝偉 ╳ 法國影后 蕾雅瑟杜（Léa Seydoux） 一棵銀杏樹，三個世代的百年風華 德國一座中世紀大學城的植物園中，一棵古老的銀杏樹靜靜矗立著。這個沉默的見證者，見證著三個時代中、人們與自然之間的深層聯結。 故事始於1908年。才華橫溢的女學生格蕾特（露娜維德勒 飾）帶著科學熱忱，在那個科學界由男性主導的年代，她試圖衝破性別枷鎖，透過植物攝影發現銀杏樹隱藏在微觀自然中的神聖規律。這棵銀杏樹也見證了女性與科學的覺醒。 時光流轉來到1972年，銀杏樹更加壯碩。性格孤僻的學生漢內斯（恩佐布魯姆 飾），為了愛情去照料一盆天竺葵，開始察覺植物也有其獨特的感知能力。這份對植物的感知與連結，除撫慰了他的孤獨，更改變了他對世界與自我關係的看法。 時序進入2020年，全球因疫情變得寂靜。神經科學家王教授（梁朝偉 飾）被困在空無一人的馬爾堡大學校園，與古老的銀杏樹產生了靈魂的共鳴。他在植物學家愛麗絲（蕾雅瑟杜 飾）啟發下，開始一場結合生命科學與植物感知的實驗，發現百年前格蕾特的女性影像與漢內斯對生命的感知，都如同年輪般、封存在這棵樹的記憶裡。 三個不同時代的孤獨靈魂，在銀杏樹的葉落與光影中，完成一場跨時空交匯。他們在大自然的見證下，被大自然靜謐、永恆且神祕的力量所改變，進而省思了生命的意涵。 Set in the botanical garden of a medieval town in Germany. Three epochs, three personalities, three sometimes clumsy but sincere attempts to free themselves and to create links with the plants and the world of the garden. An encounter.

In 1908, the university’s first female student gains admission into the prestigious botany department, confronting the sexism of both professors and peers. In 1972, amidst counterculture movements, a reserved student finds his attention captured by a fellow housemate and the geranium plant she studies. In 2020, during the COVID-19 pandemic, a neuroscientist from Hong Kong secures the help of a renowned botanist for an experiment on the old ginkgo tree.

synopsis: 在留尼旺的一個社區裡，宰牲節快要到了，小朋友卻因為家裡的傳統被同學嘲笑成「動物殺手」。當一隻山羊真的被送來時，他決定想辦法保護牠—可是，鄰居正偷偷盯著看。這是一個關於勇氣、選擇和友誼的動人故事。
tmdb_overview: 在留尼旺島上，12歲小男孩在路邊養著一頭可愛羔羊。即將到來的古爾邦節，讓他擔心羔羊會被獻祭並煮成餐桌上的菜餚，他聯手剛搬來的鄰居女孩，決心拯救最親愛的動物夥伴。本片透過青春活潑的童趣調性，展現島民獨特的風土民情，以及馬約特人、科摩羅人、穆斯林等多元族群的宗教與文化異同，展現重要且難得的人文紀錄。
tmdb_overview_en: In a Reunion Island housing project, as the time of the sacrifice for the Aïd el-Kebir approaches, Ibrahim, 12 years old and of Comoran descent, is bullied by Evan, a neighbor of the same age, who accuses him of being an animal killer. When Ibrahim learns that a goat is about to be delivered to his building he decides to save it . . . but Evan is watching. The rescue of the goat leads to some unlikely alliances as Ibrahim attempts to succeed at the rescue against all odds.

synopsis: 一隻黑色小鳥和一隻白色小鳥住在一棵大樹上，過著平和快樂的生活。然而每當有新鮮事發生，他們便吵吵鬧鬧想爭個高下。透過簡單的兩隻小鳥主人翁的日常生活，用生動有趣的方式和孩子談論關於包容，妒忌和友情⋯⋯
tmdb_overview: A little red bird perches on the treetop and begins to sing sweetly. The two little birds hear it and begin a courtship competition where each tries to get attention.
tmdb_overview_en: A little red bird perches on the treetop and begins to sing sweetly. The two little birds hear it and begin a courtship competition where each tries to get attention.

synopsis: 德國動畫導演朱莉婭．奧克作品，畫風色彩簡約、故事節奏明快，別具風格、趣味橫生，是輕鬆愉快的喜劇小動畫。
synopsis_en: A work by German animation director Julia Ocker, this short animated comedy features a minimalist visual style and brisk pacing. Unique and full of humor, it is a lighthearted and delightful experience.

synopsis: 一大早的兔子班一陣騷動，因為班上來了個轉學生，而且竟然是隻青蛙！身為班上最特別的存在，蛙蛙不管做什麼都引人注目，然而和同學們語言不通，吃飯習慣也大不相同，蛙蛙覺得孤單又寂寞，有人會伸出援手，和他做朋友嗎？
synopsis_en: The Rabbit Class is in a stir this morning because a new transfer student has arrived—and he’s a frog! As the most unique member of the class, Froggy draws attention no matter what he does. However, between the language barrier and his very different eating habits, Froggy feels lonely and isolated. Will anyone reach out a helping hand and become his friend?

synopsis: 因為戰爭，阿弗雷不得不帶著家當遠離家鄉。他挨家挨戶請求幫助，卻一次一次被拒於門外。直到他遇到了願意釋出善意，遞出熱咖啡來溫暖他的夥伴。
tmdb_overview: Alfred had to flee his country because of the war. Without housing, he wanders, from rejection to rejection. One day he meets Sonia, who offers him a coffee…
tmdb_overview_en: Alfred had to flee his country because of the war. Without housing, he wanders, from rejection to rejection. One day he meets Sonia, who offers him a coffee…

synopsis: 卡皮巴拉一家逃進雞舍避難，可是雞群覺得牠們「好奇怪！」沒想到，一隻小雞先伸出翅膀說：「嗨，我想跟你們當朋友！」從那天起，農場裡有了不一樣的笑聲。因為當我們學會打開心門，世界也會變得更大一點。
tmdb_overview: 狩獵季節就要開始了，水豚一家為了躲避獵人的襲擊，偷偷摸摸地來到了雞舍。但母雞們對這群不速之客一點兒也不信任，三番兩次想趕走牠們，唯獨小雞對小水豚釋出了友誼。這份單純而信任的友誼，也意外改寫了兩個家族的命運⋯⋯。
tmdb_overview_en: A female capybara and her cubs are fleeing from a hunter who has settled in the lagoon where they live. Their search for shelter takes them to a nearby chicken coop, but the chickens, seeing their routine threatened, reject the capybaras and react by setting boundaries to keep them at a distance. The curiosity of the youngest, a puppy and a chick, will make them transgress the boundaries and take some risks in order to get to know each other. The situation will lead to an unexpected end that will change the lives of both species and, perhaps, that of some other animals.

synopsis: ★ 入圍第62屆金馬獎七項大獎（最佳新導演、攝影、美術設計、男女主角等） 諭明與依庭在大學圖書館的「Deep Quiet Room」相識，兩人相愛並走入婚姻，原以為生活將平穩展開，卻在依庭懷孕後，過往的壓力與家庭陰影逐漸浮現，連帶改變了兩人的關係。行動不便的岳父搬入同住，諭明努力維繫這個家，過著陌生客套的窒息生活。始終無法猜透依庭內心的諭明，直到他讀到依庭正在編輯的書，才驚覺她所承受的，遠超過自己所理解的一切。
tmdb_overview: 諭明（張孝全飾）與依庭（林依晨飾）在大學圖書館的「Deep Quiet Room」相識，兩人相愛並走入婚姻，原以為生活將平穩展開，卻在依庭懷孕後，過往的壓力與家庭陰影逐漸浮現，連帶改變了兩人的關係。
tmdb_overview_en: After his pregnant wife Yi-ting unexpectedly committed suicide, Ming decides to take care of his father-in-law, only to find out the unbearable truth of Yi-ting’s family that leads to her death.

movie_title_en: The Stars and Moon are Holes in The Sky
synopsis: 改編自吉行淳之介同名文學鉅作 小說家矢添克二（綾野剛 飾）自從被妻子拋棄後，十年來始終單身。某天，他偶然與大學時代的同學（柄本佑 飾）重逢，得知對方的女兒已經21歲，這才真切感受到歲月流逝。他偶爾也會召妓，試圖以妓女千枝子（田中麗奈 飾）填補離婚後心中的缺口，舔舐被妻子拋棄的傷痛。年過不惑卻依然在內心掙扎的矢添，將自己投射到筆下小說的主角A（綾野剛一人分飾兩角）身上，描寫A與小自己20歲的女大學生B子之間的戀情，藉此探索「精神戀愛的可能性」。某日，矢添在畫廊裡與女大學生瀨川紀子（咲耶 飾）命運般地相遇。開車送紀子回家的途中，因她一次「失態」的意外舉動，兩人發展出一段奇異的情事。對戀愛既憎恨又恐懼，卻又打從心底渴望被愛的矢添，是否還能再次正視一個女人呢……？
tmdb_title: The Stars and the Moon are Holes in the Sky
tmdb_title_en: The Stars and the Moon are Holes in the Sky
tmdb_overview: 1969年春天。失婚多年的小說家矢添，在黑白的昭和日常裡過著近乎透明的生活。除了吃飯與寫作，他只與妓女維持近乎供需交換的肉體往來。直到遇見率直的女大生紀子，曖昧迅速滋長。當身體的親密糾纏逐漸演變為心理攻防，矢添被迫直視自己對情感連結的恐懼，以及那個令他難以啟齒的祕密。
tmdb_overview_en: A 40-something disillusioned novelist, Yazoe, haunted by a failed marriage and a crippling personal secret, navigates hollow affairs with a courtesan named Chieko while projecting his emotional void onto the protagonists of his love novels—until an accidental encounter with a naive college student, Noriko Seyawa, unravels his guarded solitude, forcing him to confront his fear of intimacy and the buried trauma shaping his twisted philosophy on love.

synopsis: 66歲的美子與16歲的孫子相依為命。然而隨著年齡增長，她逐漸察覺記憶開始出現問題，被診斷出早期阿茲海默症。就在此時，一起震驚社區的少女死亡事件，也讓原本平靜的生活蒙上一層陰影。某天，美子在社區文化中心看到一張「詩歌課程」的海報，抱著好奇與期待報名參加。老師鼓勵學生重新觀察世界，從花朵、風景與日常細節中發現詩意。於是，美子開始用不同的眼光凝視身邊的一切。然而，在尋找詩句的過程中，美子也逐漸被迫面對現實與人性的複雜。當記憶逐漸流逝，她試圖在破碎的生活中寫下屬於自己的詩，也重新思考：在這個並不完美的世界裡，人究竟該如何守住善良與尊嚴呢?
tmdb_overview: Crude Poetry is a film about language. It is a film about a deep wish to be understood. Set in the ruins of biblical Babel, a long-lost city which housed speakers of a so called ‘universal language’, two characters come together to make meaning, in this stop motion, live puppetry hybrid.
tmdb_overview_en: Crude Poetry is a film about language. It is a film about a deep wish to be understood. Set in the ruins of biblical Babel, a long-lost city which housed speakers of a so called ‘universal language’, two characters come together to make meaning, in this stop motion, live puppetry hybrid.

synopsis: 如果你能打開一扇門，走進去重溫人生中的關鍵時刻，會發生什麼事？莎拉和大衛是兩位素未謀面的單身男女，在一次共同朋友的婚禮上相遇，因為各種出人意料的命運轉折，他們踏上一段大膽、奇幻又美麗的旅程。這是一場充滿趣味與奇想的冒險，他們得以重返各自過去的重要時刻，重新理解自己如何走到今天的現在，甚至有機會改寫自己的未來。
tmdb_overview: 莎拉和大衛是兩位素未謀面的單身男女，在一次共同朋友的婚禮上相遇，因為各種出人意料的命運轉折，他們踏上一段大膽、奇幻又美麗的旅程。這是一場充滿趣味與奇想的冒險，他們得以重返各自過去的重要時刻，重新理解自己如何走到今天的現在，甚至有機會改寫自己的未來。
tmdb_overview_en: Sarah and David are single strangers who meet at a mutual friend’s wedding and soon, through a surprising twist of fate, find themselves on a funny, fantastical, sweeping adventure together where they get to re-live important moments from their respective pasts, illuminating how they got to where they are in the present... and possibly getting a chance to alter their futures.

synopsis: 《坂本龍一：OPUS》新銳導演 空音央 首部劇情長片 在近未來的東京，地震頻繁的壓抑日常裡，高中生摯友悠多和小幸盡情揮霍反叛的年少輕狂。從夜店臨檢中逃脫、潛入教室放送電音節奏，瞧不起體制歧視的勢利造作。一次惡作劇，使得校長執意在校園安裝電子監控系統，而掀起抗爭風波。悠多只想活在當下追逐音樂夢，小幸則因身分認同覺醒走上街頭，眼看青春就要分歧而告終，他們的友誼也在畢業前夕逐漸失控。獻給叛逆靈魂的末世寓言、致敬躁動世代的青春頌歌。從近未來觀照日本當代議題，兼具膽識與遠見，以地震創傷、移民隔閡、體制亂象等切面，刻畫青春成長的軌跡，被譽為既批判極權亦吟詠青春的話題之作。不論世界如何動盪變化，也無法抹煞我們一起衝撞的無畏時光。
tmdb_overview: 東京的夜晚燈火閃爍，高中生悠多、小幸與朋友盡情蹉跎光陰玩樂享受。從夜店警察臨檢中逃脫、潛入教室放送電音節奏，瞧不起體制歧視的勢利造作。一次惡作劇卻引發校長追究，安裝電子保全全面監控，不料竟打亂校園生活、掀起了思潮風波。悠多只想活在當下追逐音樂夢，小幸則因身分認同覺醒走上街頭，在地震頻繁的壓抑氛圍中，他們的友誼也在畢業前夕逐漸失控。
tmdb_overview_en: In a near-future Japanese city bracing for a devastating earthquake, a group of teenage friends navigate personal struggles and fractured bonds amid rising tension.

synopsis: 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務。他們的目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？ 因為「過去曾有舞蹈經驗」臨時成軍的奇葩隊伍，包括：現任孤兒院輔導員、實則為傳說級的前殺手「戴亞」（佐久間大介 飾）；此次任務的召集人、風間組的二當家「熊城」（椎名桔平 飾）；討厭群體行動的冷酷殺手「桐生」（中本悠太／NCT 飾）；性格火爆卻富有義氣的殺手「阿新」（青柳翔 飾）；落魄的前黑道大叔「村雨」（小澤仁志 飾）。原本水火不容的殺手們逐漸被舞蹈的魅力吸引，不知不覺中成了名副其實的「舞林殺手」，一路過關斬將，朝冠軍之路晉級？！
tmdb_overview: 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務，目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，而唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？
tmdb_overview_en: Former assassin Daiya has long left the criminal world, but he decides to take up a mission to kill a rival gang boss for a huge payday. The catch: To kill his target at a talent show, he must go undercover and perform in a pop dance group.

synopsis: ★ 2024 坎城影展 主競賽單元、2024 聖保羅國際影展 最佳國際影片、2024 多倫多影展 特別貢獻獎 21世紀前二十一年，一位中國女性沉默著經歷了喧囂的生活。巧巧，中國北方城市大同的野模特兒。她的男友斌哥，一個無所事事的男人。大同，是一座煤礦城市。他們在大同相愛，整天遊蕩、盡情歌舞。生活猶如一場盛大狂歡，剛至高潮，卻已曲終人散。巧巧踏上旅程，尋找失落的愛人。在漫長的時空之旅中，她始終沉默不語。本片從 2001 年開始拍攝，也經歷了二十二年的時空之旅。
tmdb_overview: 千禧年初，巧巧在大同舞廳隨著一曲熱浪起步，她與浪子斌哥貼身共舞，男子口口聲聲要闖天涯，轉身卻只留一封簡訊道別。音訊斷絕後，巧巧背上舊背包沿鐵道南下：礦區下崗潮席捲街巷，高鐵銀弧割開稻浪，三峽蓄水吞沒故里石階。廣州夜店旋燈映出她疲憊目光，口罩下的呼吸在空城夜裡迴盪，沉默成為她量度國土脈動的刻度，愛情是唯一指北，腳步始未停歇。
tmdb_overview_en: Years after her boyfriend left her for the big city and promised to bring her there after he’s settled down, a Chinese woman sets out on a journey to be reunited with him.

director: 伊爾蒂蔻恩伊達 Ildikó Enyedi
synopsis: ★榮獲威尼斯影展國際影評人費比西獎、馬斯楚安尼獎等六項大獎 德國一座中世紀大學城的植物園中，一棵古老的銀杏樹靜靜矗立著，見證著三個時代中人們與自然之間的深層聯結。故事始於1908年，女學生格蕾特帶著科學熱忱，透過植物攝影發現銀杏樹隱藏在微觀自然中的神聖規律…。1972年，性格孤僻的學生漢內斯，為了愛情去照料一盆天竺葵，開始察覺植物也有其獨特的感知能力…。2020年，因疫情神經科學家王教授被困在空無一人的校園，與古老的銀杏樹產生了靈魂的共鳴，開始一場結合生命科學與植物感知的實驗，發現百年前格蕾特的女性影像與漢內斯對生命的感知，都如同年輪般、封存在這棵樹的記憶裡……。
tmdb_overview: 德國某大學，一棵矗立在此好幾世紀的銀杏樹，靜靜地陪伴世間風景變換。1908年，第一個招收的女學生，在男性主宰的世界裡以攝影發掘了植物的奧祕。1972年．沉默的男孩與一株天竺葵之間，牽起了難以言說的連結。2020年，前來講學的香港神經學家為疫情所困，對銀杏樹展開奇想實驗。三組人物、三個篇章，跨越了時間與空間，在樹下織起了神祕且美麗的交會。
tmdb_overview_en: On the grounds of a medieval German university town looms an imposing Ginkgo biloba, a tree whose longevity stands in marked contrast to three intimate, human-scaled stories. In 1908, the university’s first female student gains admission into the prestigious botany department, confronting the sexism of both professors and peers. In 1972, amidst counterculture movements, a reserved student finds his attention captured by a fellow housemate and the geranium plant she studies. In 2020, during the COVID-19 pandemic, a neuroscientist from Hong Kong secures the help of a renowned botanist for an experiment on the old ginkgo tree.

synopsis: 2025法國電影筆記年度十大佳片 日本影史傳奇人物《鐵道員》攝影 木村大作 ╳ 配樂大師 岩代太郎 被踢出幫派的黑道大哥三浦，在漁村過著勉強度日的討海人生，卻意外與港邊被捉弄的失明男孩幸太成了忘年之交。隱瞞身分的他，是幸太悲慘童年的希望；為了讓幸太重見光明，三浦鋌而走險，當男孩終於得到了「光」，男人卻自此失去了蹤跡。十數年過去，重逢近在眼前，但逃不掉的過去還是重新找上三浦，他再次拿起手槍，只為了守護比自己更重要的人。 導演藤井道人繼《家族極道物語》後，再度與日本國民歐吉桑館廣合作，詮釋老派的鐵漢柔情，銀幕新秀尾上真秀與人氣新星真榮田鄉敦，共同演繹下一代的溫暖真摯。在攝影大師木村大作掌鏡下，35毫米膠卷的質感與古典佈光，不但注入濃厚的物語氛圍，也拍下強震來襲前的半島，讓本片不僅是對往昔人情義理的緬懷，也為能登地區留下美麗身影。 Miura, an aging ex-yakuza, develops an unexpected bond with Kota, a blind orphan. As they grow closer like family, Miura learns that Kota's sight can be restored with surgery. Determined to help, he steals money from his former yakuza group and leaves it for Kota before turning himself in. 12 years later, Miura is released from prison. Upon learning this, the yakuza plans to kill both Miura and Kota. Miura sacrifices himself to protect Kota and...

synopsis: 小說家矢添克二自從被妻子拋棄後，十年來始終單身。某天，他偶然與大學時代的同學重逢，得知對方的女兒已經 21 歲，這才真切感受到歲月流逝。他偶爾也會召妓，試圖以妓女千枝子填補離婚後心中的缺口，舔舐被妻子拋棄的傷痛。年過不惑卻依然在內心掙扎的矢添，將自己投射到筆下小說的主角A身上，描寫A與小自己20歲的女大學生B之間的戀情，藉此探索「精神戀愛的可能性」。某日，矢添在畫廊裡與女大學生瀬川紀子命運般地相遇。開車送紀子回家的途中，因她一次「失態」的意外舉動，兩人發展出一段奇異的情事。對戀愛既憎恨又恐懼，卻又打從心底渴望被愛的矢添，是否還能再次正視一個女人呢……？

tmdb_overview: 1969年春天。失婚多年的小說家矢添，在黑白的昭和日常裡過著近乎透明的生活。除了吃飯與寫作，他只與妓女維持近乎供需交換的肉體往來。直到遇見率直的女大生紀子，曖昧迅速滋長。當身體的親密糾纏逐漸演變為心理攻防，矢添被迫直視自己對情感連結的恐懼，以及那個令他難以啟齒的祕密。

synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

director: 克里斯汀佩佐 Christian Petzold
synopsis: ★2025法國電影筆記年度十大佳片 鋼琴系學生蘿拉在一次週末出遊途中，意外捲入車禍，雖然毫髮無傷但男友卻重傷過世，內心則被巨大的驚嚇與空虛籠罩。在德國鄉間遇見一名目睹事故的婦人，對方因蘿拉神似早逝的女兒，而溫柔地收留她進入宛如世外桃源的家庭。這個看似溫暖的避風港，實則充滿難以言明的替代與投射，婦人試圖將失去女兒的空缺，填補在蘿拉身上，而蘿拉也在被關懷與被期待之間，逐漸感到窒息……。

tmdb_overview_en: On a weekend trip to the countryside, Laura miraculously survives a car crash. Physically unhurt but deeply shaken, she is taken in by a local woman who witnessed the accident and now cares for Laura with motherly devotion. When her husband and adult son also give up their initial resistance to Laura's presence, the four of them slowly build up some family-like routine. But soon they can no longer ignore their past...

synopsis: ★ 榮獲威尼斯影展國際影評人費比西獎、馬斯楚安尼獎等六項大獎 ★ 榮獲芝加哥國際影展 銀雨果獎最佳攝影獎 ★榮獲Silver Spike國際影展銀穗獎與綠穗獎 ★ 榮獲里斯本影展 評審團特別獎 德國一座中世紀大學城的植物園中，一棵古老的銀杏樹靜靜矗立著。這個沉默的見證者，見證著三個時代中、人們與自然之間的深層聯結。

tmdb_overview: 德國某大學，一棵矗立在此好幾世紀的銀杏樹，靜靜地陪伴世間風景變換。1908年，第一個招收的女學生，在男性主宰的世界裡以攝影發掘了植物的奧祕。1972年．沉默的男孩與一株天竺葵之間，牽起了難以言說的連結。2020年，前來講學的香港神經學家為疫情所困，對銀杏樹展開奇想實驗。三組人物、三個篇章，跨越了時間與空間，在樹下織起了神祕且美麗的交會。
tmdb_overview_en: On the grounds of a medieval German university town looms an imposing Ginkgo biloba, a tree whose longevity stands in marked contrast to three intimate, human-scaled stories. In 1908, the university’s first female student gains admission into the prestigious botany department, confronting the sexism of both professors and peers. In 1972, amidst counterculture movements, a reserved student finds his attention captured by a fellow housemate and the geranium plant she studies. In 2020, during the COVID-19 pandemic, a neuroscientist from Hong Kong secures the help of a renowned botanist for an experiment on the old ginkgo tree.

tmdb_overview: 改編自真實事件。1977年2月8日，東尼基里西斯闖入全盛貸款公司總裁理查霍爾的辦公室，以一把改造過的獵槍劫持他為人質，並將那把槍以一條「死亡連線」從扳機連接到人質的脖子上，也與自己相連。這場人質危機持續63小時，期間透過新聞媒體直播，引發全美國的高度關注。究竟托尼的極限行動會如何收場？
tmdb_overview_en: In 1977, former real estate developer Tony Kiritsis puts a dead man's switch on himself and the mortgage banker who did him wrong, demanding $5 million and a personal apology.

synopsis: ★榮獲威尼斯影展國際影評人費比西獎、馬斯楚安尼獎等六項大獎 德國一座中世紀大學城的植物園中，一棵古老的銀杏樹靜靜矗立著，見證著三個時代中人們與自然之間的深層聯結。故事始於1908年，女學生格蕾特帶著科學熱忱，透過植物攝影發現銀杏樹隱藏在微觀自然中的神聖規律…。1972年，性格孤僻的學生漢內斯，為了愛情去照料一盆天竺葵，開始察覺植物也有其獨特的感知能力…。2020年，因疫情神經科學家王教授被困在空無一人的校園，與古老的銀杏樹產生了靈魂的共鳴，開始一場結合生命科學與植物感知的實驗，發現百年前格蕾特的女性影像與漢內斯對生命的感知，都如同年輪般、封存在這棵樹的記憶裡……。

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title_en: Palimpsest: The Story of a Name
country: 法國 France﹑香港 Hong Kong﹑台灣 Taiwan
synopsis: 2025 多倫多影展 Toronto IFF 2025 阿姆斯特丹國際紀錄片影展 IDFA 2025 金馬獎最佳紀錄長片、最佳剪輯 Best Documentary Feature & Best Editing, Golden Horse Awards 擁有東方面孔的華裔資深剪輯師雪美蓮，卻有著洋化姓氏：Stephen。她透過父親留下的筆記，深入鮮為人知的家族歷史，驚覺父母皆有著曾經隱姓埋名、真假難辨的過往：父親似乎是澳洲原住民漁民後裔；曾有著文學夢的母親，過去又似乎與英國小說家吳爾芙的家族成員在中國的戀情有著幽微牽連。 為了探尋「Stephen」之名的真偽，她翻找家庭電影與老照片，在那段殖民擴張與動盪的時代中，重新建構一段比現實更趨近真相的私密家族史。她在多重敘事中追問身分認同，探尋個體如何在離散的迷霧中，透過重寫歷史而重新翱翔，拼湊出跨越國境與世紀風雲的生命圖像。 Veteran editor Mary Stephen investigates a lifelong enigma: why does she possess a Chinese face but the Western surname "Stephen"? This personal story uncovers her parents' assumed names and hidden lives, from an Australian aboriginal lineage to a secret link with Virginia Woolf's nephew. Set against a colonial backdrop, the film reveals a history long obscured by the fog of displacement. Stephen navigates a maze of conflicting narratives, piecing together a profound cinematic portrait of identity and the resilience of the self.
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
tmdb_title: Palimpsest: the Story of a Name
tmdb_title_en: Palimpsest: the Story of a Name
tmdb_overview: 資深剪輯師雪美蓮，總納悶自己到底姓史蒂芬，還是姓雪、姓陳？明明亞洲臉，又非混血，怎取洋人姓？一查不得了，父親竟來自澳洲！母親曾有文學夢，似還牽涉吳爾芙姪子的中國戀情？她化身偵探親自執導，翻找父親傳記、家庭電影、老照片，以「史蒂芬」為圓心，拼出一幅與世紀風雲、名人交織的私密家族史，追問殖民與身分認同。血緣纏如網，個體仍能重寫自我，乘故事翱翔。
tmdb_overview_en: Veteran filmmaker Mary Stephen digs into her own family past to uncover the long-hidden origins of her Western surname, revealing a story of culture shock, colonialism, and contested remembrance.

synopsis: 距今約五十年前，高雄曾經有座歌廳名為「藍寶石」，是80年代臺灣最傳奇的歌廳，從豬哥亮到鄧麗君，無數巨星在此加冕，「去藍寶石聽歌」成為當時最流行的休閒娛樂，只要天王天后蒞臨，皆萬人空巷、一票難求。 在戒嚴與解嚴交替、經濟起飛的時代，位於南部的藍寶石大歌廳有著自由不羈的風氣，帶來與「老三台」綜藝節目不同的風貌，藍寶石大歌廳不僅代表高雄，也對臺灣演藝史寫下重要的一頁。 電影預告 其他熱映 now showing view more

tmdb_overview: 諭明（張孝全飾）與依庭（林依晨飾）在大學圖書館的「Deep Quiet Room」相識，兩人相愛並走入婚姻，原以為生活將平穩展開，卻在依庭懷孕後，過往的壓力與家庭陰影逐漸浮現，連帶改變了兩人的關係。
tmdb_overview_en: After his pregnant wife Yi-ting unexpectedly committed suicide, Ming decides to take care of his father-in-law, only to find out the unbearable truth of Yi-ting’s family that leads to her death.

synopsis: ★2025金馬獎最佳紀錄片、剪輯 資深剪輯師雪美蓮，總納悶自己到底姓史蒂芬，還是姓雪、姓陳？明明亞洲臉，又非混血，怎取洋人姓？一查不得了，父親竟來自澳洲！母親曾有文學夢，似還牽涉吳爾芙姪子的中國戀情？她化身偵探親自執導，翻找父親傳記、家庭電影、老照片，以「史蒂芬」為圓心，拼出一幅與世紀風雲、名人交織的私密家族史，追問殖民與身分認同。血緣纏如網，個體仍能重寫自我，乘故事翱翔。

synopsis: 故事延續《超級瑪利歐兄弟電影版》，該片於2023年締造全球13億美元的驚人票房紀錄。由再度回歸的導演亞倫霍瓦特以及麥可傑勒尼克執導，馬修福格也再度回擔任編劇，配樂師布萊恩泰勒也再度回歸編寫電影配樂。 電影預告 其他熱映 now showing view more
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

tmdb_overview: 查理在咖啡廳邂逅艾瑪，一場笨拙的搭話開啟了兩年的甜蜜愛戀。正當兩人深信彼此是唯一、著手籌備婚禮時，一場好友聚會卻掀起波瀾。在「分享最糟糕往事」的遊戲中，艾瑪意外坦白一段不為人知的震撼過去。這份祕密讓全場難以置信，也讓查理開始重新審視這份關係。在步入禮堂的最後關頭，兩人的愛情正受誠信與信任的嚴峻考驗。
tmdb_overview_en: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

tmdb_overview: 出身電影世家的女星諾拉，在劇場界赫赫發光、稱霸一方。妹妹安涅絲則選擇家庭，和老公孩子過著平靜的生活。她們曾經盛極一時、離家多年的名導父親古斯塔夫企圖東山再起，於是向諾拉提出新片邀約。諾拉雖然婉拒，沉埋已久的傷痛卻再次被挑起。被拒絕的古斯塔夫，轉而改邀渴望成名的美國女星瑞秋擔綱演出。欣喜若狂的瑞秋一口答應，卻很快發現自己竟無意間介入了一場極度私密、充滿親情糾葛的家庭關係……。
tmdb_overview_en: Sisters Nora and Agnes reunite with their estranged father, the charismatic Gustav, a once-renowned director who offers stage actress Nora a role in what he hopes will be his comeback film. When Nora turns it down, she soon discovers he has given her part to an eager young Hollywood star.

synopsis: 2025法國電影筆記年度十大佳片 日本影史傳奇人物《鐵道員》攝影 木村大作 ╳ 配樂大師 岩代太郎 被踢出幫派的黑道大哥三浦，在漁村過著勉強度日的討海人生，卻意外與港邊被捉弄的失明男孩幸太成了忘年之交。隱瞞身分的他，是幸太悲慘童年的希望；為了讓幸太重見光明，三浦鋌而走險，當男孩終於得到了「光」，男人卻自此失去了蹤跡。十數年過去，重逢近在眼前，但逃不掉的過去還是重新找上三浦，他再次拿起手槍，只為了守護比自己更重要的人。 導演藤井道人繼《家族極道物語》後，再度與日本國民歐吉桑館廣合作，詮釋老派的鐵漢柔情，銀幕新秀尾上真秀與人氣新星真榮田鄉敦，共同演繹下一代的溫暖真摯。在攝影大師木村大作掌鏡下，35毫米膠卷的質感與古典佈光，不但注入濃厚的物語氛圍，也拍下強震來襲前的半島，讓本片不僅是對往昔人情義理的緬懷，也為能登地區留下美麗身影。 Miura, an aging ex-yakuza, develops an unexpected bond with Kota, a blind orphan. As they grow closer like family, Miura learns that Kota's sight can be restored with surgery. Determined to help, he steals money from his former yakuza group and leaves it for Kota before turning himself in. 12 years later, Miura is released from prison. Upon learning this, the yakuza plans to kill both Miura and Kota. Miura sacrifices himself to protect Kota and...

synopsis: ★ 第46屆金穗影展觀摩影片 那年夏天，媽媽又住進醫院。沂凌因身世問題再加上遭受姊姊思晴突如其來的妒忌，而感到無所適從。在日復一日的生活中，她們練習用力呼吸，也練習迎接死亡到來的那一天。 https://reurl.cc/V2EmY5

tmdb_overview_en: In that summer, mom is admjavascript:window.document.synopsis.submit()itted to the hospital again. Ling was at a loss at home with the reappearance of her birth mom as well as the sudden change of jealous attitude from her elder sister Ching. How should they encounter the forth coming death? It turns out that something as natural as breathing needs practice as well.

synopsis: ★2021 金馬影展 自閉症者天生不懂得，也學不會一般人表達感情的方式，難以應付主流社會複雜的人際互動，但他們往往固?於特定愛好，進而在特定範疇如繪畫、音樂、寫作上，展現特有的天分。韓淑華老師十多年來教導自閉症者繪畫，白天的星星對他們獨特的美學風格屢感驚艷，2003年她成立多寶藝術學堂，為成年泛自閉症者提供持續創作的避風港。林正盛導演也從那時開始，記錄他們的日常。本片透過對四位泛自閉者近身的紀錄，觀察他們與同儕、親人和老師的互動，呈現他們與生俱來不同於一般人情感表達方式的獨特生命狀態。 https://reurl.cc/V2EmY5
tmdb_overview: 「老師說我一輩子都學不會，我很痛苦、我很生氣，卻又無法出言反駁。」患有口語表達障礙的廷瑋，常有幻聽、幻覺的大學生沛軒，無法適應學校生活的惠綸，感情充沛卻不擅表達的樹緯，他們在地球上迷了航，卻在多寶藝術學堂韓淑華老師的引領下，用動人的詩句和音樂，以及多彩畫筆，突破冷漠疏離，揮灑出內心熱烈的小宇宙。
tmdb_overview_en: In 2010, director Lin Cheng-sheng made Twinkle Twinkle Little Star, a documentary about autistic children and their teacher Han Shu-hua, who taught her young charges to express themselves through art. In this moving follow-up, Lin once again follows Han, who has since founded a shelter institute where autistic children can nurture their talents in painting and music. Because of their inability to effectively communicate their emotions and thoughts, people with autism can often be treated like outsiders. To inspire empathy for them, Lin made this moving documentary that embraces the diversity that these talented individuals and their stirring works of art bring to our lives.

movie_title: 【嬰兒車電影院】馬拉庫達大冒險

synopsis: 探險家徐仁修用50年行走荒野雨林，透過鏡頭與文字記錄自然的壯麗與脆弱。他不只是觀察者，更是與自然共生的行者。 然而，2019 年，他歷經人生首次手術，身體發出時間的警訊，也啟動一場他稱為「最後的探險」，深入亞馬遜，只為追尋夢想多年的藍閃蝶。
tmdb_overview: 四十五年來，徐仁修透過攝影與文字探索自然，既記錄其壯麗，亦警示其消亡。2019 年的一場手術，讓他首次感受到時間的重量。本片跟隨他踏上可能是人生最後的旅程——不僅深入荒野，更直面生死。當這位自然哲人走向終極遠征時，拍攝團隊也在過程中蛻變，開始思索生命、自然與人類共同的局限。
tmdb_overview_en: For 45 years, Jen-Shiu Hsu has used photography and writing to explore the intricate universe of nature. He has tirelessly shared his discoveries with the world, exposing both its beauty and the destruction caused by human civilization. But in 2019, after undergoing surgery for the first time in his life, he became acutely aware of time. Suddenly, his lifelong rhythm of exploration faced an unavoidable limit. His final, unfinished expedition—will it be the closing chapter of his journey, or the start of something new? This documentary observes a man who has always sought the core of nature, now faced with the reality of his own mortality. As he embarks on one last great adventure, the film also captures how the filmmaking team, through their own journeys, begins to question their relationship with nature and their understanding of life itself.

synopsis: 三歲那年，愛蜜莉的世界悄然展開。一次與巧克力的奇妙邂逅，點燃了她對萬物的好奇，也開啟了她看見世界的眼光。她與家中溫柔細心的幫傭西尾小姐結下深厚情誼，隨著四季流轉，愛蜜莉在日常與自然的細語中，感知著愛、失落與那些藏在靜謐家庭背後的情感波動。生活在戰後日本的異鄉時光，如夢似幻、如雨般輕柔，一點一滴滲進她尚未明白的情緒與心靈旅程。 電影預告 其他熱映 now showing view more

movie_title: 流光剪影：雪美蓮的影像記憶
movie_title_en: The Texture of Memory: Films by Mary Stephen
synopsis: 安詳辭世 A Very Easy Death 雪美蓮 Mary STEPHEN｜加拿大 Canada｜1975｜DCP ｜B&W、Color｜9min 大加拿大成人禮 Pawaganak: The Great Canadian Puberty Rite 雪美蓮 Mary STEPHEN｜加拿大 Canada｜1974｜DCP ｜B&W、Color｜19min 絲之影 Shades of Silk 雪美蓮 Mary STEPHEN｜法國 France﹑加拿大 Canada｜1978｜DCP ｜Color｜62min 2025 多倫多影展 Toronto IFF 2025 紐約影展 New York FF 2026 鹿特丹影展 IFF Rotterdam 在成為法國新浪潮大師艾力侯麥御用剪輯師前，雪美蓮早已透過鏡頭，捕捉流散者在異鄉與故土間的徘徊﹑身分認同的掙扎與成長陣痛。本次放映的四部早期作品，包括首部長片《絲之影》，以及三部風格迥異的珍稀短片——《迷宮》﹑《安詳辭世》﹑《大加拿大成人禮》，雪美蓮藉由音畫，將個人經歷化為感性的詩篇。 從加拿大的公路洗禮、巴黎學生宿舍的夢囈，到面對死亡的靜謐凝視，她的影像如絲綢般細膩且充滿韌性。這些作品如遊走於東西方文化之間的記憶碎片，以鏡頭記錄其對自我身份的感知和探求。 Before her legendary tenure as Éric Rohmer's editor, Mary Stephen was already a "tailor of images," using her camera to record a series of rites of passage. This screening anchors her debut feature,
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en:
**A Very Easy Death**
Mary STEPHEN｜Canada｜1975｜DCP｜B&W, Color｜9min

**Pawaganak: The Great Canadian Puberty Rite**
Mary STEPHEN｜Canada｜1974｜DCP｜B&W, Color｜19min

**Shades of Silk**
Mary STEPHEN｜France, Canada｜1978｜DCP｜Color｜62min

2025 Toronto IFF
2025 New York FF
2026 IFF Rotterdam

Long before her legendary tenure as Éric Rohmer’s long-time editor, Mary Stephen was already a "tailor of images," using her camera to capture the displacement of the diaspora, the struggle for identity, and the growing pains of coming of age. This screening features four of her early works, including her debut feature *Shades of Silk* and three rare shorts of distinct styles—*Labyrinth*, *A Very Easy Death*, and *Pawaganak: The Great Canadian Puberty Rite*. Through the interplay of sound and image, Stephen transforms personal experience into evocative visual poetry. From a Canadian road-trip baptism and the somniloquy of a Parisian student dorm to a quiet gaze at death, her imagery is as delicate and resilient as silk. These works serve as memory fragments drifting between Eastern and Western cultures, documenting her perception and search for selfhood.

tmdb_overview: 1580年，英國。貧困的拉丁語家教威廉莎士比亞遇見自由奔放的艾格妮絲，兩人深受對方吸引，展開一段熾熱戀情，並迅速步入婚姻，與三個孩子過著幸福的生活。但當遠在倫敦的威廉戲劇事業迅速發展之際，艾格妮絲卻必須獨自撐起他們的家庭。突如其來的悲劇，讓這對夫妻曾經堅不可摧的羈絆就此受到嚴峻考驗，而這段經歷，也造就了莎士比亞的不朽傑作────〈哈姆雷特〉。
tmdb_overview_en: The powerful story of love and loss that inspired the creation of Shakespeare's timeless masterpiece, Hamlet.

synopsis: 小說家矢添克二自從被妻子拋棄後，十年來始終單身。某天，他偶然與大學時代的同學重逢，得知對方的女兒已經 21 歲，這才真切感受到歲月流逝。他偶爾也會召妓，試圖以妓女千枝子填補離婚後心中的缺口，舔舐被妻子拋棄的傷痛。年過不惑卻依然在內心掙扎的矢添，將自己投射到筆下小說的主角A身上，描寫A與小自己20歲的女大學生B之間的戀情，藉此探索「精神戀愛的可能性」。某日，矢添在畫廊裡與女大學生瀬川紀子命運般地相遇。開車送紀子回家的途中，因她一次「失態」的意外舉動，兩人發展出一段奇異的情事。對戀愛既憎恨又恐懼，卻又打從心底渴望被愛的矢添，是否還能再次正視一個女人呢……？
tmdb_title: The Stars and the Moon are Holes in the Sky
tmdb_title_en: The Stars and the Moon are Holes in the Sky
tmdb_overview: 1969年春天。失婚多年的小說家矢添，在黑白的昭和日常裡過著近乎透明的生活。除了吃飯與寫作，他只與妓女維持近乎供需交換的肉體往來。直到遇見率直的女大生紀子，曖昧迅速滋長。當身體的親密糾纏逐漸演變為心理攻防，矢添被迫直視自己對情感連結的恐懼，以及那個令他難以啟齒的祕密。
tmdb_overview_en: A 40-something disillusioned novelist, Yazoe, haunted by a failed marriage and a crippling personal secret, navigates hollow affairs with a courtesan named Chieko while projecting his emotional void onto the protagonists of his love novels—until an accidental encounter with a naive college student, Noriko Seyawa, unravels his guarded solitude, forcing him to confront his fear of intimacy and the buried trauma shaping his twisted philosophy on love.

tmdb_overview: 她是女神、是聖母、是電、是光、是舞臺上的神話。流行天后儘管擁有無數歌迷擁戴，舞台下卻被困囚在幻聽與失眠的陰影中。為了籌備全新演出而瀕臨崩潰的她，登門尋求疏遠已久的好友兼傳奇服裝設計師協助，試圖在高級訂製服的層層織網中，重新縫補自己破碎的靈魂。當兩人隱身於穀倉的工作室，過去的愛恨情仇、權力拉鋸與扭曲慾望，如同鬼魅，隨著針線與旋律穿透皮膚，化作名望與自我摧毀的心理戰爭。
tmdb_overview_en: Long-buried wounds rise to the surface when iconic pop star Mother Mary reunites with her estranged best friend and former costume designer Sam Anselm on the eve of her comeback performance.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1941 奧斯卡金像獎最佳影片、黑白攝影 Best Picture & Best Cinematography (Black-and-White), Academy Awards 2018 美國國家電影保護局典藏影片 National Film Registry, National Film Preservation Board 妙齡女子在異地邂逅英國紳士，墜入情網後旋即閃婚，隨丈夫返回康沃爾郡的宏偉莊園。豈料古宅並非蜜月愛巢，而是男人亡妻幽影徘徊的迷宮：從擺設、舊衣到房間每個角落，都彷彿低語她的存在。少婦深陷焦慮，冷若冰霜的女管家更時時提醒：她永遠無法取代前任女主人。當一艘失事船隻被打撈上岸，莊園深藏的謊言與死亡謎團，也悄然浮出水面。 希區考克首部美國電影，改編杜莫里哀1938年的同名小說，以高對比黑白光影重現驚悚迷情，在海斯法典的嚴格限制下觸及婚內出軌、女女情愫等禁忌。女作家杜莫里哀乃哥德羅曼史名家，文風不僅啟發《地獄新娘》的原著小說《米蘭夫人》，更一度被誤認為該書的真正作者。
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
tmdb_overview: 年輕女子（Joan Fontaine 飾）初遇曼德利主人德文特（Laurence Olivier 飾）是在海邊的懸崖邊上。她以為德文特要跳海自盡，大叫一聲，讓德文特生氣不已。然而，接下來的二人相識繼而相知的經歷讓他們墮入愛河，結為伉儷，女子成為了曼德利莊園的女主人。幸福的生活眼看就要鋪開，這個新婚妻子卻遭遇到了陰森的「寒流」。她發現這個莊園到處可見德文特前妻麗貝卡的影子，她的名字，在傢俱留下痕跡，更令新婚妻子不安的是，管家丹佛斯太太，更是念念不忘麗貝卡，對這個新來的主人充滿仇恨。就連丈夫德文特，也不願意解釋這一切，彷彿他的內心還有舊情。麗貝卡猶如夢魘般瀰漫在曼德利莊園，事情開始變得越來越複雜。
tmdb_overview_en: Story of a young woman who marries a fascinating widower only to find out that she must live in the shadow of his former wife, Rebecca, who died mysteriously several years earlier. The young wife must come to grips with the terrible secret of her handsome, cold husband, Max De Winter. She must also deal with the jealous, obsessed Mrs. Danvers, the housekeeper, who will not accept her as the mistress of the house.

synopsis: ★ 《薄荷糖》、《綠洲》、《密陽》、《燃燒烈愛》韓國電影大師李滄東傳世經典之作，一代韓國傳奇影后尹靜姬最終大銀幕演出 ★ 榮獲 坎城影展最佳劇本、天主教人道精神兩項大獎
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

tmdb_overview: Cate is a smart, working class girl under the thumb of her best friend Maddie, but Cate is having trouble conforming to what Maddie and high school society demand of her. Both girls are preoccupied with the same boy, but only one of them is being sent poetry.
tmdb_overview_en: Cate is a smart, working class girl under the thumb of her best friend Maddie, but Cate is having trouble conforming to what Maddie and high school society demand of her. Both girls are preoccupied with the same boy, but only one of them is being sent poetry.

synopsis: 66歲的美子與16歲的孫子相依為命。然而隨著年齡增長，她逐漸察覺記憶開始出現問題，被診斷出早期阿茲海默症。就在此時，一起震驚社區的少女死亡事件，也讓原本平靜的生活蒙上一層陰影。某天，美子在社區文化中心看到一張「詩歌課程」的海報，抱著好奇與期待報名參加。老師鼓勵學生重新觀察世界，從花朵、風景與日常細節中發現詩意。於是，美子開始用不同的眼光凝視身邊的一切。然而，在尋找詩句的過程中，美子也逐漸被迫面對現實與人性的複雜。當記憶逐漸流逝，她試圖在破碎的生活中寫下屬於自己的詩，也重新思考：在這個並不完美的世界裡，人究竟該如何守住善良與尊嚴呢?
tmdb_overview: Crude Poetry is a film about language. It is a film about a deep wish to be understood. Set in the ruins of biblical Babel, a long-lost city which housed speakers of a so called ‘universal language’, two characters come together to make meaning, in this stop motion, live puppetry hybrid.
tmdb_overview_en: Crude Poetry is a film about language. It is a film about a deep wish to be understood. Set in the ruins of biblical Babel, a long-lost city which housed speakers of a so called ‘universal language’, two characters come together to make meaning, in this stop motion, live puppetry hybrid.

director: 伊爾蒂蔻恩伊達 Ildiko Enyedi
synopsis: France/China | Color | Germany | 147min | C/E Subtitles | 輔12 威尼斯影展國際影評人費比西獎、馬斯楚安尼獎等六項大獎 芝加哥國際影展 銀雨果獎最佳攝影獎 Silver Spike國際影展銀穗獎與綠穗獎 里斯本影展 評審團特別獎 永河畔拉羅什國際影展 評審團大獎 奧斯滕德影展 最佳影片大獎 坎城影帝 梁朝偉 ╳ 法國影后 蕾雅瑟杜（Léa Seydoux） 一棵銀杏樹，三個世代的百年風華 德國一座中世紀大學城的植物園中，一棵古老的銀杏樹靜靜矗立著。這個沉默的見證者，見證著三個時代中、人們與自然之間的深層聯結。 故事始於1908年。才華橫溢的女學生格蕾特（露娜維德勒 飾）帶著科學熱忱，在那個科學界由男性主導的年代，她試圖衝破性別枷鎖，透過植物攝影發現銀杏樹隱藏在微觀自然中的神聖規律。這棵銀杏樹也見證了女性與科學的覺醒。 時光流轉來到1972年，銀杏樹更加壯碩。性格孤僻的學生漢內斯（恩佐布魯姆 飾），為了愛情去照料一盆天竺葵，開始察覺植物也有其獨特的感知能力。這份對植物的感知與連結，除撫慰了他的孤獨，更改變了他對世界與自我關係的看法。 時序進入2020年，全球因疫情變得寂靜。神經科學家王教授（梁朝偉 飾）被困在空無一人的馬爾堡大學校園，與古老的銀杏樹產生了靈魂的共鳴。他在植物學家愛麗絲（蕾雅瑟杜 飾）啟發下，開始一場結合生命科學與植物感知的實驗，發現百年前格蕾特的女性影像與漢內斯對生命的感知，都如同年輪般、封存在這棵樹的記憶裡。 三個不同時代的孤獨靈魂，在銀杏樹的葉落與光影中，完成一場跨時空交匯。他們在大自然的見證下，被大自然靜謐、永恆且神祕的力量所改變，進而省思了生命的意涵。 Set in the botanical garden of a medieval town in Germany. Three epochs, three personalities, three sometimes clumsy but sincere attempts to free themselves and to create links with the plants and the world of the garden. An encounter.
tmdb_overview: 德國某大學，一棵矗立在此好幾世紀的銀杏樹，靜靜地陪伴世間風景變換。1908年，第一個招收的女學生，在男性主宰的世界裡以攝影發掘了植物的奧祕。1972年．沉默的男孩與一株天竺葵之間，牽起了難以言說的連結。2020年，前來講學的香港神經學家為疫情所困，對銀杏樹展開奇想實驗。三組人物、三個篇章，跨越了時間與空間，在樹下織起了神祕且美麗的交會。
tmdb_overview_en: On the grounds of a medieval German university town looms an imposing Ginkgo biloba, a tree whose longevity stands in marked contrast to three intimate, human-scaled stories. In 1908, the university’s first female student gains admission into the prestigious botany department, confronting the sexism of both professors and peers. In 1972, amidst counterculture movements, a reserved student finds his attention captured by a fellow housemate and the geranium plant she studies. In 2020, during the COVID-19 pandemic, a neuroscientist from Hong Kong secures the help of a renowned botanist for an experiment on the old ginkgo tree.

tmdb_overview: 俊美少年沉浸在交友軟體與一段段性冒險中，在每次短暫接觸中盜用對方話語、性格與職業背景，並在下一場約會重塑自己的身分。眾生相浮華流轉，唯有內心的渴望猶存。
tmdb_overview_en: A gay man impersonates men he has had sex with and brings this new persona with him to his next hook-up. Only by pretending to be someone else can he be truly himself.

synopsis: ★ 「金獎製造機」A24最新出品，打造史上最抓馬婚禮！ ★ 【夢行者保羅】克里斯多佛博格利自編自導， 前所未有的愛情喜劇新體驗

Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. tmdb_overview: 孤立於首爾「大都市的愛情法」邊緣，哲俊的生活屬於脫北者間的小圈圈，更因隱藏的性向而總感到格格不入。在鼓起勇氣參加了一場聯誼後，他意外踏入另一個屬於同志的社群，更認識了另一名少年永准，開啟了未曾有過的新生活。然而，無論是北緯38度線上的思鄉遠眺，或在鐘路三街裡的情愫暗湧，人人都得面對自己反覆繞著轉的圈圈，困於跳脫或停留的取捨抉擇中……
tmdb_overview_en: Despite the close bonds among fellow defectors, Cheol-jun—a young North Korean defector—felt isolated while hiding his gay identity. Finally, he takes his first step into South Korea's vibrant gay community and forms close ties after meeting Yeong-jun at a casual gathering. Yet, a trivial misunderstanding shatters these fragile bonds.

synopsis: ★ 2025 全州國際影展 韓國競賽單元四項大獎得主 《3670》描寫一名來到首爾生活的北韓脫北青年，在兩種身分之間尋找歸屬的故事。由導演朴俊浩自編自導，本片聚焦同時身為「脫北者」與「同志」的年輕男子哲俊，在南韓社會努力適應新生活的同時，首次踏入首爾的同志社群，並在友情與情感連結之中，逐漸尋得能夠卸下防備的片刻。然而，當他試圖維繫彼此分離的兩個世界，脆弱建立的關係也開始產生裂痕。片名《3670》源自韓國同志社群的暗語——「鐘路3街6號出口，7點集合」，象徵一群人在城市角落尋找彼此的方式。
tmdb_overview: 孤立於首爾「大都市的愛情法」邊緣，哲俊的生活屬於脫北者間的小圈圈，更因隱藏的性向而總感到格格不入。在鼓起勇氣參加了一場聯誼後，他意外踏入另一個屬於同志的社群，更認識了另一名少年永准，開啟了未曾有過的新生活。然而，無論是北緯38度線上的思鄉遠眺，或在鐘路三街裡的情愫暗湧，人人都得面對自己反覆繞著轉的圈圈，困於跳脫或停留的取捨抉擇中……

Finally, he takes his first step into South Korea's vibrant gay community and forms close ties after meeting Yeong-jun at a casual gathering. Yet, a trivial misunderstanding shatters these fragile bonds.

tmdb_overview: 查理在咖啡廳邂逅艾瑪，一場笨拙的搭話開啟了兩年的甜蜜愛戀。正當兩人深信彼此是唯一、著手籌備婚禮時，一場好友聚會卻掀起波瀾。在「分享最糟糕往事」的遊戲中，艾瑪意外坦白一段不為人知的震撼過去。這份祕密讓全場難以置信，也讓查理開始重新審視這份關係。在步入禮堂的最後關頭，兩人的愛情正受誠信與信任的嚴峻考驗。
tmdb_overview_en: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

director: 亞倫霍瓦特、麥可傑勒尼克

synopsis: ★2024 SCHLiNGEL兒少影展兒童電影類最佳國際劇情片、最佳兒童演員鑽石獎；兒童評審團最佳影片、一般評審團最佳影片等5項提名 ★2025 魁北克電影節最佳影片、最佳男主角等6項提名 ★《臭皮匠發財夢》、《星叭克超有種》安托萬貝特朗領銜主演 菲利普是一位缺乏靈感的歌劇作曲家，他被迫收留他的侄女西蒙娜，一個叛逆、古怪的孤兒，而她的最好的朋友是一隻臭鼬。儘管性格截然相反，菲利普和西蒙娜很快就發現，他們可能比最初想像的更需要彼此。 https://reurl.cc/X2WpGR
tmdb_overview: 11歲的孤兒少女西蒙妮，在祖母死後，必須離開農場的家，而菲利普，一位曾創作出傑作但靈感枯竭很久的歌劇作曲家，則被迫收留他那叛逆又古怪的姪女西蒙妮，跟著她一起入住的死黨，竟然是一隻臭鼬！儘管兩人的個性南轅北轍，菲利普和西蒙妮很快發現，他們可能比自己想像的還需要彼此。
tmdb_overview_en: Philippe, an opera composer in search of inspiration, is forced to take in Simone, his rebellious, eccentric niece whose best friend is a skunk. Despite their diametrically opposed personalities, Philippe and Simone quickly discover that they may need each other more than they first thought.

synopsis: ☀️ 希望天氣很好，我們屋頂見。
screen_name: DREAM PLAZA 7 樓空中花園
tmdb_overview: 五名成長背景與個性大相不同的男女同學，個性叛逆讓師長同痛不已，在被罰留校察看的期間，他們漸漸發現彼此並非那麼不同，在放下戒心與敵意後，變成了心意相通的好友，進而啟發了彼此的人生。
tmdb_overview_en: Five high school students from different walks of life endure a Saturday detention under a power-hungry principal. The disparate group includes rebel John, princess Claire, outcast Allison, brainy Brian and Andrew, the jock. Each has a chance to tell his or her story, making the others see them a little differently -- and when the day ends, they question whether school will ever be the same.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 俠士金山戈原本打算從軍報國，投靠張哲元帥麾下，不料卻被栽贓成殺害丞相之子的兇手，遭元帥發配邊疆。押解途中遇上 金兵，金山戈 趁亂 自 行解開枷鎖，打敗金兵逃脫。張哲被金人元帥完顏所殺，張哲之女恩珠，在王封的幫助下逃到陸莊。為了報仇雪恨，他們廣招英雄。金山戈剛好行經比武大會，武藝超群的他為王封賞識，力邀抗金。金山戈欣然答應，但條件是要娶恩珠為妻。恩珠為了報父仇只好答應，但前提是金山戈必須先提著完顏的人頭回來。 金山戈先以頹廢、無賴甚至帶點登徒子的輕佻形象出現，顛覆傳統武俠片中「俠」之形象；隨著劇情裡眾人齊力抗金的經過，也讓這位非典型俠客漸漸平反形象，最終瀟灑地如西部英雄般退場。
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
tmdb_overview: Set in Sung Dynasty at a tumultuous time when China is invaded by the northern Jin Empire, the story revolves around swordsman Ge (David Tong Wai), who is wronged for murdering the son of the Prime Minister. Luckily, his superb kung fu helps him escape. But when the Sung General Chang is killed by the Jin Admiral Wanyan, and Chang's beautiful daughter Chu (Han Hsiang Chin) is seeking a patriotic hero to avenge his father's death, Ge pledges to assassinate Wanyan within ten days and marry Chu. But he has to first deal with the four kung fu masters serving under the Jin Admiral.
tmdb_overview_en: Set in Sung Dynasty at a tumultuous time when China is invaded by the northern Jin Empire, the story revolves around swordsman Ge (David Tong Wai), who is wronged for murdering the son of the Prime Minister. Luckily, his superb kung fu helps him escape. But when the Sung General Chang is killed by the Jin Admiral Wanyan, and Chang's beautiful daughter Chu (Han Hsiang Chin) is seeking a patriotic hero to avenge his father's death, Ge pledges to assassinate Wanyan within ten days and marry Chu. But he has to first deal with the four kung fu masters serving under the Jin Admiral.

synopsis: ★ 榮獲威尼斯影展國際影評人費比西獎、馬斯楚安尼獎等六項大獎 ★ 榮獲芝加哥國際影展 銀雨果獎最佳攝影獎 ★榮獲Silver Spike國際影展銀穗獎與綠穗獎 ★ 榮獲里斯本影展 評審團特別獎 德國一座中世紀大學城的植物園中，一棵古老的銀杏樹靜靜矗立著。這個沉默的見證者，見證著三個時代中、人們與自然之間的深層聯結。
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

director: 伊爾蒂蔻恩伊達 Ildikó Enyedi
synopsis: ★榮獲威尼斯影展國際影評人費比西獎、馬斯楚安尼獎等六項大獎 德國一座中世紀大學城的植物園中，一棵古老的銀杏樹靜靜矗立著，見證著三個時代中人們與自然之間的深層聯結。故事始於1908年，女學生格蕾特帶著科學熱忱，透過植物攝影發現銀杏樹隱藏在微觀自然中的神聖規律…。1972年，性格孤僻的學生漢內斯，為了愛情去照料一盆天竺葵，開始察覺植物也有其獨特的感知能力…。2020年，因疫情神經科學家王教授被困在空無一人的校園，與古老的銀杏樹產生了靈魂的共鳴，開始一場結合生命科學與植物感知的實驗，發現百年前格蕾特的女性影像與漢內斯對生命的感知，都如同年輪般、封存在這棵樹的記憶裡……。
tmdb_overview: 德國某大學，一棵矗立在此好幾世紀的銀杏樹，靜靜地陪伴世間風景變換。1908年，第一個招收的女學生，在男性主宰的世界裡以攝影發掘了植物的奧祕。1972年．沉默的男孩與一株天竺葵之間，牽起了難以言說的連結。2020年，前來講學的香港神經學家為疫情所困，對銀杏樹展開奇想實驗。三組人物、三個篇章，跨越了時間與空間，在樹下織起了神祕且美麗的交會。
tmdb_overview_en: On the grounds of a medieval German university town looms an imposing Ginkgo biloba, a tree whose longevity stands in marked contrast to three intimate, human-scaled stories. In 1908, the university’s first female student gains admission into the prestigious botany department, confronting the sexism of both professors and peers. In 1972, amidst counterculture movements, a reserved student finds his attention captured by a fellow housemate and the geranium plant she studies. In 2020, during the COVID-19 pandemic, a neuroscientist from Hong Kong secures the help of a renowned botanist for an experiment on the old ginkgo tree.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1986 日本藍絲帶獎最佳影片 Best Film, Blue Ribbon Awards 1986 每日電影獎最佳影片、導演、男配角 Best Film, Director, 1986 奧斯卡金像獎 最佳服裝設計獲獎；最佳導演、攝影、美術設計提名 戰國大名一文字秀虎曾經縱橫沙場、不可一世，年逾七十後卻常感力不從心，決意退位養老。未料將城池分給三兄弟後，長子隨即翻臉羞辱，逼他出走，次子也暗謀逆反，冷眼相待。唯因直言敢諫而被逐出家門的三子，不僅暗中派人護駕，更溫暖迎納流亡老父。目睹家系骨肉相殘，心受過往惡業折磨，梟雄秀虎漸成瘋魔，無語能對命運荒波。 角色設定與《影武者》天地對望並更臻化境，將莎翁悲劇《李爾王》縫入日本戰國時代，仲代達矢以深厚演劇功底創造極強情緒渲染力，堪稱本片宏偉史詩氣韻最重要的元素。劇組雖沿用了《影武者》的服裝與道具，仍耗資千萬美金調度浩大戰爭場面，刷新當時日本影史最高拍攝成本，也成就黑澤明匯聚畢生心血的顛峰之作。
tags: 奧斯卡金像獎最佳服裝設計
無名．仲代達矢紀念特集
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
tmdb_overview: 久經沙場的老將也終將卸甲歸田，一文字秀虎在七十歲這一年宣佈退位，由長子接任家督重職，卻引發三子強烈反彈，遭父親逐出家門。秀虎本以為可以就此安享天年，沒想到一件件手足相殘的事件，讓一文字家陷入殺聲震耳的連天烽火。
tmdb_overview_en: Shakespeare's King Lear is reimagined as a singular historical epic set in sixteenth-century Japan where an aging warlord divides his kingdom between his three sons.

movie_title_en: The Stars and Moon are Holes in The Sky
synopsis: 改編自吉行淳之介同名文學鉅作 小說家矢添克二（綾野剛 飾）自從被妻子拋棄後，十年來始終單身。某天，他偶然與大學時代的同學（柄本佑 飾）重逢，得知對方的女兒已經21歲，這才真切感受到歲月流逝。他偶爾也會召妓，試圖以妓女千枝子（田中麗奈 飾）填補離婚後心中的缺口，舔舐被妻子拋棄的傷痛。年過不惑卻依然在內心掙扎的矢添，將自己投射到筆下小說的主角A（綾野剛一人分飾兩角）身上，描寫A與小自己20歲的女大學生B子之間的戀情，藉此探索「精神戀愛的可能性」。某日，矢添在畫廊裡與女大學生瀨川紀子（咲耶 飾）命運般地相遇。開車送紀子回家的途中，因她一次「失態」的意外舉動，兩人發展出一段奇異的情事。對戀愛既憎恨又恐懼，卻又打從心底渴望被愛的矢添，是否還能再次正視一個女人呢……？
tmdb_title: The Stars and the Moon are Holes in the Sky
tmdb_title_en: The Stars and the Moon are Holes in the Sky
tmdb_overview: 1969年春天。失婚多年的小說家矢添，在黑白的昭和日常裡過著近乎透明的生活。除了吃飯與寫作，他只與妓女維持近乎供需交換的肉體往來。直到遇見率直的女大生紀子，曖昧迅速滋長。當身體的親密糾纏逐漸演變為心理攻防，矢添被迫直視自己對情感連結的恐懼，以及那個令他難以啟齒的祕密。
tmdb_overview_en: A 40-something disillusioned novelist, Yazoe, haunted by a failed marriage and a crippling personal secret, navigates hollow affairs with a courtesan named Chieko while projecting his emotional void onto the protagonists of his love novels—until an accidental encounter with a naive college student, Noriko Seyawa, unravels his guarded solitude, forcing him to confront his fear of intimacy and the buried trauma shaping his twisted philosophy on love.

synopsis: 三歲那年，愛蜜莉的世界悄然展開。一次與巧克力的奇妙邂逅，點燃了她對萬物的好奇，也開啟了她看見世界的眼光。她與家中溫柔細心的幫傭西尾小姐結下深厚情誼，隨著四季流轉，愛蜜莉在日常與自然的細語中，感知著愛、失落與那些藏在靜謐家庭背後的情感波動。生活在戰後日本的異鄉時光，如夢似幻、如雨般輕柔，一點一滴滲進她尚未明白的情緒與心靈旅程。 電影預告 其他熱映 now showing view more
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

tmdb_overview: 她是女神、是聖母、是電、是光、是舞臺上的神話。流行天后儘管擁有無數歌迷擁戴，舞台下卻被困囚在幻聽與失眠的陰影中。為了籌備全新演出而瀕臨崩潰的她，登門尋求疏遠已久的好友兼傳奇服裝設計師協助，試圖在高級訂製服的層層織網中，重新縫補自己破碎的靈魂。當兩人隱身於穀倉的工作室，過去的愛恨情仇、權力拉鋸與扭曲慾望，如同鬼魅，隨著針線與旋律穿透皮膚，化作名望與自我摧毀的心理戰爭。
tmdb_overview_en: Long-buried wounds rise to the surface when iconic pop star Mother Mary reunites with her estranged best friend and former costume designer Sam Anselm on the eve of her comeback performance.

synopsis: 奧斯卡提名波蘭名導揚科馬薩 全新心理驚悚懸疑力作！ 2025艾美獎最佳男主角史蒂芬葛拉翰 再次直擊人性深淵 19 歲的問題青少年湯米沉迷於毒品、派對與暴力，過著毫無節制的生活。某天深夜，他在一次失控的狂歡後與朋友走散，意外遭到陌生男子克里斯綁架，醒來時發現自己被囚禁在一棟偏僻郊區住宅的地下室。這個家庭由父親克里斯、性格詭譎的母親凱瑟琳，以及他們年幼的兒子所組成，他們聲稱想「拯救」湯米，透過一套扭曲而極端的方式，將這名失控的少年「重新教育」成一個「乖孩子」。
tmdb_overview: 英格蘭鄉間一座私人宅邸，雇主慈眉善目待人和氣，女主人雖然寡言，但他們的小孩卻很開朗。這裡只用環境友善的無毒清潔劑，手機在屋內則是違禁品。他們不介意來幫傭的女孩是非法移民，認識環境後，她被帶到地下室，介紹家裡的第四個成員：一位口出穢言，行為失控，被鐵鍊拴在牆上，等待「痊癒」的年輕男子。
tmdb_overview_en: Tommy, a volatile 19-year-old, revels in drugs, parties and violence. After getting separated from his friends on a drunken bender, he is abducted by a shadowy figure. He wakes to find himself imprisoned in the basement of a remote Yorkshire house, inhabited by a very strange family. But what unfolds is not what he could possibly expect.

tmdb_overview: 千禧年初，巧巧在大同舞廳隨著一曲熱浪起步，她與浪子斌哥貼身共舞，男子口口聲聲要闖天涯，轉身卻只留一封簡訊道別。音訊斷絕後，巧巧背上舊背包沿鐵道南下：礦區下崗潮席捲街巷，高鐵銀弧割開稻浪，三峽蓄水吞沒故里石階。廣州夜店旋燈映出她疲憊目光，口罩下的呼吸在空城夜裡迴盪，沉默成為她量度國土脈動的刻度，愛情是唯一指北，腳步始未停歇。
tmdb_overview_en: Years after her boyfriend left her for the big city and promised to bring her there after he’s settled down, a Chinese woman sets out on a journey to be reunited with him.

synopsis: ～改編自 吉行淳之介 同名小說～ 「你愛上的，是軀殼。」 小說家矢添克二（綾野剛 飾）自從被妻子拋棄後，十年來始終單身。某天，他偶然與大學時代的同學（柄本佑 飾）重逢，得知對方的女兒已經21歲，這才真切感受到歲月流逝。他偶爾也會召妓，試圖以妓女千枝子（田中麗奈 飾）填補離婚後心中的缺口，舔舐被妻子拋棄的傷痛。年過不惑卻依然在內心掙扎的矢添，將自己投射到筆下小說的主角A（綾野剛一人分飾兩角）身上，描寫A與小自己20歲的女大學生B子之間的戀情，藉此探索「精神戀愛的可能性」。某日，矢添在畫廊裡與女大學生瀨川紀子（咲耶 飾）命運般地相遇。開車送紀子回家的途中，因她一次「失態」的意外舉動，兩人發展出一段奇異的情事。對戀愛既憎恨又恐懼，卻又打從心底渴望被愛的矢添，是否還能再次正視一個女人呢……？ 電影預告 其他熱映

synopsis: 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務。他們的目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？ 因為「過去曾有舞蹈經驗」臨時成軍的奇葩隊伍，包括：現任孤兒院輔導員、實則為傳說級的前殺手「戴亞」（佐久間大介 飾）；此次任務的召集人、風間組的二當家「熊城」（椎名桔平 飾）；討厭群體行動的冷酷殺手「桐生」（中本悠太／NCT 飾）；性格火爆卻富有義氣的殺手 「阿新」 （青柳翔 飾）；落魄的前黑道大叔「村雨」（小澤仁志 飾）。原本水火不容的殺手們逐漸被舞蹈的魅力吸引，不知不覺中成了名副其實的「舞林殺手」，一路過關斬將，朝冠軍之路晉級？！

★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.

synopsis: ☀️ 希望天氣很好，我們屋頂見。
screen_name: DREAM PLAZA 7 樓空中花園
tmdb_overview: 提姆有家族遺傳的特殊能力，可以穿越時空，而他也運用這種能力追到了他喜愛的女孩。但是，提姆越來越頻繁地使用這種能力，卻不清楚其中隱藏的危險……
tmdb_overview_en: The night after another unsatisfactory New Year's party, Tim's father tells his son that the men in his family have always had the ability to travel through time. They can't change history, but they can change what happens and has happened in their own lives. Thus begins the start of a lesson in learning to appreciate life itself as it is, as it comes, and most importantly, the people living alongside us.

synopsis: 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務。他們的目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？ 因為「過去曾有舞蹈經驗」臨時成軍的奇葩隊伍，包括：現任孤兒院輔導員、實則為傳說級的前殺手「戴亞」（佐久間大介 飾）；此次任務的召集人、風間組的二當家「熊城」（椎名桔平 飾）；討厭群體行動的冷酷殺手「桐生」（中本悠太／NCT 飾）；性格火爆卻富有義氣的殺手「阿新」（青柳翔 飾）；落魄的前黑道大叔「村雨」（小澤仁志 飾）。原本水火不容的殺手們逐漸被舞蹈的魅力吸引，不知不覺中成了名副其實的「舞林殺手」，一路過關斬將，朝冠軍之路晉級？！
tmdb_overview: 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務，目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，而唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？
tmdb_overview_en: Former assassin Daiya has long left the criminal world, but he decides to take up a mission to kill a rival gang boss for a huge payday. The catch: To kill his target at a talent show, he must go undercover and perform in a pop dance group.

synopsis: ★ 2024 坎城影展 主競賽單元、2024 聖保羅國際影展 最佳國際影片、2024 多倫多影展 特別貢獻獎 21世紀前二十一年，一位中國女性沉默著經歷了喧囂的生活。巧巧，中國北方城市大同的野模特兒。她的男友斌哥，一個無所事事的男人。大同，是一座煤礦城市。他們在大同相愛，整天遊蕩、盡情歌舞。生活猶如一場盛大狂歡，剛至高潮，卻已曲終人散。巧巧踏上旅程，尋找失落的愛人。在漫長的時空之旅中，她始終沉默不語。本片從 2001 年開始拍攝，也經歷了二十二年的時空之旅。
tmdb_overview: 千禧年初，巧巧在大同舞廳隨著一曲熱浪起步，她與浪子斌哥貼身共舞，男子口口聲聲要闖天涯，轉身卻只留一封簡訊道別。音訊斷絕後，巧巧背上舊背包沿鐵道南下：礦區下崗潮席捲街巷，高鐵銀弧割開稻浪，三峽蓄水吞沒故里石階。廣州夜店旋燈映出她疲憊目光，口罩下的呼吸在空城夜裡迴盪，沉默成為她量度國土脈動的刻度，愛情是唯一指北，腳步始未停歇。
tmdb_overview_en: Years after her boyfriend left her for the big city and promised to bring her there after he’s settled down, a Chinese woman sets out on a journey to be reunited with him.

tmdb_overview: Cate is a smart, working class girl under the thumb of her best friend Maddie, but Cate is having trouble conforming to what Maddie and high school society demand of her. Both girls are preoccupied with the same boy, but only one of them is being sent poetry.
tmdb_overview_en: Cate is a smart, working class girl under the thumb of her best friend Maddie, but Cate is having trouble conforming to what Maddie and high school society demand of her. Both girls are preoccupied with the same boy, but only one of them is being sent poetry.

synopsis: ★ 榮獲第62屆金馬獎最佳女配角獎 長年在台灣工作的阿耀返鄉，與弟妹一同處理父親的喪事，卻在葬禮過程中遭遇宗教局介入，企圖帶走父親遺體。面對突如其來的衝突，三兄妹各自展現截然不同的態度：哥哥阿耀選擇退讓、弟弟阿財正面衝撞、妹妹水雲則勉力維持儀式與秩序。隨著喪事推進，塵封的家族往事逐漸浮現——關於走私、遷徙、疾病，以及始終無法取得的身分證。在記憶與現實交錯之中，三人被迫重新理解父親，也重新審視自己在這片土地上的位置……。
tmdb_overview: 在台灣工作的阿耀回到馬來西亞，與弟妹一起為父親舉辦喪禮，卻遇到宗教局人員突然來訪，帶走了父親的遺體。原來父親生前偷偷加入了回教，因此必須葬在回教墓園。不服氣的兄弟倆因而展開搶回遺體的旅程。過程中，阿耀回憶起小時候父親教他如何在這對華人不公平的社會狡猾求存，而妹妹水雲也發現了父親入回教的真正原因。
tmdb_overview_en: When Ah Yao returns to Malaysia for his father’s funeral, he expects grief, not chaos. But everything turns upside down when the religious police storm in, claiming his father—who secretly converted to Islam—must be buried in an Islamic cemetery. Refusing to let go, Ah Yao and his siblings set out on a wild, darkly comedic journey to reclaim the body, confronting cultural clashes, family secrets, and absurd obstacles along the way.

tmdb_overview: 查理在咖啡廳邂逅艾瑪，一場笨拙的搭話開啟了兩年的甜蜜愛戀。正當兩人深信彼此是唯一、著手籌備婚禮時，一場好友聚會卻掀起波瀾。在「分享最糟糕往事」的遊戲中，艾瑪意外坦白一段不為人知的震撼過去。這份祕密讓全場難以置信，也讓查理開始重新審視這份關係。在步入禮堂的最後關頭，兩人的愛情正受誠信與信任的嚴峻考驗。
tmdb_overview_en: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

movie_title: (英) 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
tmdb_title_local: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
tmdb_overview: Having thwarted Bowser's previous plot to marry Princess Peach, Mario and Luigi now face a fresh threat in Bowser Jr., who is determined to liberate his father from captivity and restore the family legacy. Alongside companions new and old, the brothers travel across the stars to stop the young heir's crusade.
tmdb_overview_en: Having thwarted Bowser's previous plot to marry Princess Peach, Mario and Luigi now face a fresh threat in Bowser Jr., who is determined to liberate his father from captivity and restore the family legacy. Alongside companions new and old, the brothers travel across the stars to stop the young heir's crusade.

synopsis: ★ 《薄荷糖》、《綠洲》、《密陽》、《燃燒烈愛》韓國電影大師李滄東傳世經典之作，一代韓國傳奇影后尹靜姬最終大銀幕演出 ★ 榮獲 坎城影展最佳劇本、天主教人道精神兩項大獎
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

director: 伊爾蒂蔻恩伊達 Ildikó Enyedi
synopsis: ★榮獲威尼斯影展國際影評人費比西獎、馬斯楚安尼獎等六項大獎 德國一座中世紀大學城的植物園中，一棵古老的銀杏樹靜靜矗立著，見證著三個時代中人們與自然之間的深層聯結。故事始於1908年，女學生格蕾特帶著科學熱忱，透過植物攝影發現銀杏樹隱藏在微觀自然中的神聖規律…。1972年，性格孤僻的學生漢內斯，為了愛情去照料一盆天竺葵，開始察覺植物也有其獨特的感知能力…。2020年，因疫情神經科學家王教授被困在空無一人的校園，與古老的銀杏樹產生了靈魂的共鳴，開始一場結合生命科學與植物感知的實驗，發現百年前格蕾特的女性影像與漢內斯對生命的感知，都如同年輪般、封存在這棵樹的記憶裡……。
tmdb_overview: 德國某大學，一棵矗立在此好幾世紀的銀杏樹，靜靜地陪伴世間風景變換。1908年，第一個招收的女學生，在男性主宰的世界裡以攝影發掘了植物的奧祕。1972年．沉默的男孩與一株天竺葵之間，牽起了難以言說的連結。2020年，前來講學的香港神經學家為疫情所困，對銀杏樹展開奇想實驗。三組人物、三個篇章，跨越了時間與空間，在樹下織起了神祕且美麗的交會。
tmdb_overview_en: On the grounds of a medieval German university town looms an imposing Ginkgo biloba, a tree whose longevity stands in marked contrast to three intimate, human-scaled stories. In 1908, the university’s first female student gains admission into the prestigious botany department, confronting the sexism of both professors and peers. In 1972, amidst counterculture movements, a reserved student finds his attention captured by a fellow housemate and the geranium plant she studies. In 2020, during the COVID-19 pandemic, a neuroscientist from Hong Kong secures the help of a renowned botanist for an experiment on the old ginkgo tree.

tmdb_overview: 在台灣工作的阿耀回到馬來西亞，與弟妹一起為父親舉辦喪禮，卻遇到宗教局人員突然來訪，帶走了父親的遺體。原來父親生前偷偷加入了回教，因此必須葬在回教墓園。不服氣的兄弟倆因而展開搶回遺體的旅程。過程中，阿耀回憶起小時候父親教他如何在這對華人不公平的社會狡猾求存，而妹妹水雲也發現了父親入回教的真正原因。

But everything turns upside down when the religious police storm in, claiming his father—who secretly converted to Islam—must be buried in an Islamic cemetery. Refusing to let go, Ah Yao and his siblings set out on a wild, darkly comedic journey to reclaim the body, confronting cultural clashes, family secrets, and absurd obstacles along the way.

tmdb_overview: 德國某大學，一棵矗立在此好幾世紀的銀杏樹，靜靜地陪伴世間風景變換。1908年，第一個招收的女學生，在男性主宰的世界裡以攝影發掘了植物的奧祕。1972年．沉默的男孩與一株天竺葵之間，牽起了難以言說的連結。2020年，前來講學的香港神經學家為疫情所困，對銀杏樹展開奇想實驗。三組人物、三個篇章，跨越了時間與空間，在樹下織起了神祕且美麗的交會。
tmdb_overview_en: On the grounds of a medieval German university town looms an imposing Ginkgo biloba, a tree whose longevity stands in marked contrast to three intimate, human-scaled stories. In 1908, the university’s first female student gains admission into the prestigious botany department, confronting the sexism of both professors and peers. In 1972, amidst counterculture movements, a reserved student finds his attention captured by a fellow housemate and the geranium plant she studies. In 2020, during the COVID-19 pandemic, a neuroscientist from Hong Kong secures the help of a renowned botanist for an experiment on the old ginkgo tree.

tmdb_overview: 她是女神、是聖母、是電、是光、是舞臺上的神話。流行天后儘管擁有無數歌迷擁戴，舞台下卻被困囚在幻聽與失眠的陰影中。為了籌備全新演出而瀕臨崩潰的她，登門尋求疏遠已久的好友兼傳奇服裝設計師協助，試圖在高級訂製服的層層織網中，重新縫補自己破碎的靈魂。當兩人隱身於穀倉的工作室，過去的愛恨情仇、權力拉鋸與扭曲慾望，如同鬼魅，隨著針線與旋律穿透皮膚，化作名望與自我摧毀的心理戰爭。
tmdb_overview_en: Long-buried wounds rise to the surface when iconic pop star Mother Mary reunites with her estranged best friend and former costume designer Sam Anselm on the eve of her comeback performance.

movie_title_en: The Stars and Moon are Holes in The Sky
synopsis: 改編自吉行淳之介同名文學鉅作 小說家矢添克二（綾野剛 飾）自從被妻子拋棄後，十年來始終單身。某天，他偶然與大學時代的同學（柄本佑 飾）重逢，得知對方的女兒已經21歲，這才真切感受到歲月流逝。他偶爾也會召妓，試圖以妓女千枝子（田中麗奈 飾）填補離婚後心中的缺口，舔舐被妻子拋棄的傷痛。年過不惑卻依然在內心掙扎的矢添，將自己投射到筆下小說的主角A（綾野剛一人分飾兩角）身上，描寫A與小自己20歲的女大學生B子之間的戀情，藉此探索「精神戀愛的可能性」。某日，矢添在畫廊裡與女大學生瀨川紀子（咲耶 飾）命運般地相遇。開車送紀子回家的途中，因她一次「失態」的意外舉動，兩人發展出一段奇異的情事。對戀愛既憎恨又恐懼，卻又打從心底渴望被愛的矢添，是否還能再次正視一個女人呢……？
tmdb_title: The Stars and the Moon are Holes in the Sky
tmdb_title_en: The Stars and the Moon are Holes in the Sky
tmdb_overview: 1969年春天。失婚多年的小說家矢添，在黑白的昭和日常裡過著近乎透明的生活。除了吃飯與寫作，他只與妓女維持近乎供需交換的肉體往來。直到遇見率直的女大生紀子，曖昧迅速滋長。當身體的親密糾纏逐漸演變為心理攻防，矢添被迫直視自己對情感連結的恐懼，以及那個令他難以啟齒的祕密。
tmdb_overview_en: A 40-something disillusioned novelist, Yazoe, haunted by a failed marriage and a crippling personal secret, navigates hollow affairs with a courtesan named Chieko while projecting his emotional void onto the protagonists of his love novels—until an accidental encounter with a naive college student, Noriko Seyawa, unravels his guarded solitude, forcing him to confront his fear of intimacy and the buried trauma shaping his twisted philosophy on love.

synopsis: 日本影史傳奇人物、《鐵道員》攝影大師木村大作35毫米膠捲質感非大銀幕不可 被踢出幫派的黑道大哥三浦，在漁村過著勉強度日的討海人生，卻意外與港邊被捉弄的失明男孩幸太成了忘年之交。隱瞞身分的他，是幸太悲慘童年的希望；為了讓幸太重見光明，三浦鋌而走險，當男孩終於得到了「光」，男人卻自此失去了蹤跡。十數年過去，重逢近在眼前，但逃不掉的過去還是重新找上三浦，他再次拿起手槍，只為了守護比自己更重要的人……。
tmdb_overview: 被踢出幫派的黑道大哥三浦，在漁村過著勉強度日的討海人生，卻意外與港邊被捉弄的失明男孩幸太成了忘年之交。隱瞞身分的他，是幸太悲慘童年的希望；為了讓幸太重見光明，三浦鋌而走險，當男孩終於得到了「光」，男人卻自此失去了蹤跡。十數年過去，重逢近在眼前，但逃不掉的過去還是重新找上三浦，他再次拿起手槍，只為了守護比自己更重要的人。
tmdb_overview_en: Miura, an aging ex-yakuza, develops an unexpected bond with Kota, a blind orphan. As they grow closer like family, Miura learns that Kota's sight can be restored with surgery. Determined to help, he steals money from his former yakuza group and leaves it for Kota before turning himself in. 12 years later, Miura is released from prison. Upon learning this, the yakuza plans to kill both Miura and Kota. Miura sacrifices himself to protect Kota, and...

synopsis: 三歲那年，愛蜜莉的世界悄然展開。一次與巧克力的奇妙邂逅，點燃了她對萬物的好奇，也開啟了她看見世界的眼光。她與家中溫柔細心的幫傭西尾小姐結下深厚情誼，隨著四季流轉，愛蜜莉在日常與自然的細語中，感知著愛、失落與那些藏在靜謐家庭背後的情感波動。生活在戰後日本的異鄉時光，如夢似幻、如雨般輕柔，一點一滴滲進她尚未明白的情緒與心靈旅程。 電影預告 其他熱映 now showing view more
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

director: 亞倫霍瓦特、麥可傑勒尼克
synopsis: 故事延續《超級瑪利歐兄弟電影版》，該片於2023年締造全球13億美元的驚人票房紀錄。由再度回歸的導演亞倫霍瓦特以及麥可傑勒尼克執導，馬修福格也再度回擔任編劇，配樂師布萊恩泰勒也再度回歸編寫電影配樂。 電影預告 其他熱映 now showing view more

★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

tmdb_overview: 千禧年初，巧巧在大同舞廳隨著一曲熱浪起步，她與浪子斌哥貼身共舞，男子口口聲聲要闖天涯，轉身卻只留一封簡訊道別。音訊斷絕後，巧巧背上舊背包沿鐵道南下：礦區下崗潮席捲街巷，高鐵銀弧割開稻浪，三峽蓄水吞沒故里石階。廣州夜店旋燈映出她疲憊目光，口罩下的呼吸在空城夜裡迴盪，沉默成為她量度國土脈動的刻度，愛情是唯一指北，腳步始未停歇。
tmdb_overview_en: Years after her boyfriend left her for the big city and promised to bring her there after he’s settled down, a Chinese woman sets out on a journey to be reunited with him.

synopsis: 小說家矢添克二自從被妻子拋棄後，十年來始終單身。某天，他偶然與大學時代的同學重逢，得知對方的女兒已經 21 歲，這才真切感受到歲月流逝。他偶爾也會召妓，試圖以妓女千枝子填補離婚後心中的缺口，舔舐被妻子拋棄的傷痛。年過不惑卻依然在內心掙扎的矢添，將自己投射到筆下小說的主角A身上，描寫A與小自己20歲的女大學生B之間的戀情，藉此探索「精神戀愛的可能性」。某日，矢添在畫廊裡與女大學生瀬川紀子命運般地相遇。開車送紀子回家的途中，因她一次「失態」的意外舉動，兩人發展出一段奇異的情事。對戀愛既憎恨又恐懼，卻又打從心底渴望被愛的矢添，是否還能再次正視一個女人呢……？
tmdb_title: The Stars and the Moon are Holes in the Sky
tmdb_title_en: The Stars and the Moon are Holes in the Sky
tmdb_overview: 1969年春天。失婚多年的小說家矢添，在黑白的昭和日常裡過著近乎透明的生活。除了吃飯與寫作，他只與妓女維持近乎供需交換的肉體往來。直到遇見率直的女大生紀子，曖昧迅速滋長。當身體的親密糾纏逐漸演變為心理攻防，矢添被迫直視自己對情感連結的恐懼，以及那個令他難以啟齒的祕密。
tmdb_overview_en: A 40-something disillusioned novelist, Yazoe, haunted by a failed marriage and a crippling personal secret, navigates hollow affairs with a courtesan named Chieko while projecting his emotional void onto the protagonists of his love novels—until an accidental encounter with a naive college student, Noriko Seyawa, unravels his guarded solitude, forcing him to confront his fear of intimacy and the buried trauma shaping his twisted philosophy on love.

tmdb_overview: Cate is a smart, working class girl under the thumb of her best friend Maddie, but Cate is having trouble conforming to what Maddie and high school society demand of her. Both girls are preoccupied with the same boy, but only one of them is being sent poetry.
tmdb_overview_en: Cate is a smart, working class girl under the thumb of her best friend Maddie, but Cate is having trouble conforming to what Maddie and high school society demand of her. Both girls are preoccupied with the same boy, but only one of them is being sent poetry.

synopsis: 2025法國電影筆記年度十大佳片 日本影史傳奇人物《鐵道員》攝影 木村大作 ╳ 配樂大師 岩代太郎 被踢出幫派的黑道大哥三浦，在漁村過著勉強度日的討海人生，卻意外與港邊被捉弄的失明男孩幸太成了忘年之交。隱瞞身分的他，是幸太悲慘童年的希望；為了讓幸太重見光明，三浦鋌而走險，當男孩終於得到了「光」，男人卻自此失去了蹤跡。十數年過去，重逢近在眼前，但逃不掉的過去還是重新找上三浦，他再次拿起手槍，只為了守護比自己更重要的人。 導演藤井道人繼《家族極道物語》後，再度與日本國民歐吉桑館廣合作，詮釋老派的鐵漢柔情，銀幕新秀尾上真秀與人氣新星真榮田鄉敦，共同演繹下一代的溫暖真摯。在攝影大師木村大作掌鏡下，35毫米膠卷的質感與古典佈光，不但注入濃厚的物語氛圍，也拍下強震來襲前的半島，讓本片不僅是對往昔人情義理的緬懷，也為能登地區留下美麗身影。 Miura, an aging ex-yakuza, develops an unexpected bond with Kota, a blind orphan. As they grow closer like family, Miura learns that Kota's sight can be restored with surgery. Determined to help, he steals money from his former yakuza group and leaves it for Kota before turning himself in. 12 years later, Miura is released from prison. Upon learning this, the yakuza plans to kill both Miura and Kota. Miura sacrifices himself to protect Kota and...

synopsis: 奧斯卡提名波蘭名導揚科馬薩 全新心理驚悚懸疑力作！ 2025艾美獎最佳男主角史蒂芬葛拉翰 再次直擊人性深淵 19 歲的問題青少年湯米沉迷於毒品、派對與暴力，過著毫無節制的生活。某天深夜，他在一次失控的狂歡後與朋友走散，意外遭到陌生男子克里斯綁架，醒來時發現自己被囚禁在一棟偏僻郊區住宅的地下室。這個家庭由父親克里斯、性格詭譎的母親凱瑟琳，以及他們年幼的兒子所組成，他們聲稱想「拯救」湯米，透過一套扭曲而極端的方式，將這名失控的少年「重新教育」成一個「乖孩子」。
tmdb_overview: 英格蘭鄉間一座私人宅邸，雇主慈眉善目待人和氣，女主人雖然寡言，但他們的小孩卻很開朗。這裡只用環境友善的無毒清潔劑，手機在屋內則是違禁品。他們不介意來幫傭的女孩是非法移民，認識環境後，她被帶到地下室，介紹家裡的第四個成員：一位口出穢言，行為失控，被鐵鍊拴在牆上，等待「痊癒」的年輕男子。
tmdb_overview_en: Tommy, a volatile 19-year-old, revels in drugs, parties and violence. After getting separated from his friends on a drunken bender, he is abducted by a shadowy figure. He wakes to find himself imprisoned in the basement of a remote Yorkshire house, inhabited by a very strange family. But what unfolds is not what he could possibly expect.

tmdb_overview: 查理在咖啡廳邂逅艾瑪，一場笨拙的搭話開啟了兩年的甜蜜愛戀。正當兩人深信彼此是唯一、著手籌備婚禮時，一場好友聚會卻掀起波瀾。在「分享最糟糕往事」的遊戲中，艾瑪意外坦白一段不為人知的震撼過去。這份祕密讓全場難以置信，也讓查理開始重新審視這份關係。在步入禮堂的最後關頭，兩人的愛情正受誠信與信任的嚴峻考驗。
tmdb_overview_en: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

synopsis: 66歲的美子與16歲的孫子相依為命。然而隨著年齡增長，她逐漸察覺記憶開始出現問題，被診斷出早期阿茲海默症。就在此時，一起震驚社區的少女死亡事件，也讓原本平靜的生活蒙上一層陰影。某天，美子在社區文化中心看到一張「詩歌課程」的海報，抱著好奇與期待報名參加。老師鼓勵學生重新觀察世界，從花朵、風景與日常細節中發現詩意。於是，美子開始用不同的眼光凝視身邊的一切。然而，在尋找詩句的過程中，美子也逐漸被迫面對現實與人性的複雜。當記憶逐漸流逝，她試圖在破碎的生活中寫下屬於自己的詩，也重新思考：在這個並不完美的世界裡，人究竟該如何守住善良與尊嚴呢?
tmdb_overview: Crude Poetry is a film about language. It is a film about a deep wish to be understood. Set in the ruins of biblical Babel, a long-lost city which housed speakers of a so called ‘universal language’, two characters come together to make meaning, in this stop motion, live puppetry hybrid.
tmdb_overview_en: Crude Poetry is a film about language. It is a film about a deep wish to be understood. Set in the ruins of biblical Babel, a long-lost city which housed speakers of a so called ‘universal language’, two characters come together to make meaning, in this stop motion, live puppetry hybrid.

synopsis: 距今約五十年前，高雄曾經有座歌廳名為「藍寶石」，是80年代臺灣最傳奇的歌廳，從豬哥亮到鄧麗君，無數巨星在此加冕，「去藍寶石聽歌」成為當時最流行的休閒娛樂，只要天王天后蒞臨，皆萬人空巷、一票難求。 在戒嚴與解嚴交替、經濟起飛的時代，位於南部的藍寶石大歌廳有著自由不羈的風氣，帶來與「老三台」綜藝節目不同的風貌，藍寶石大歌廳不僅代表高雄，也對臺灣演藝史寫下重要的一頁。 電影預告 其他熱映 now showing view more

synopsis: 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務。他們的目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？ 因為「過去曾有舞蹈經驗」臨時成軍的奇葩隊伍，包括：現任孤兒院輔導員、實則為傳說級的前殺手「戴亞」（佐久間大介 飾）；此次任務的召集人、風間組的二當家「熊城」（椎名桔平 飾）；討厭群體行動的冷酷殺手「桐生」（中本悠太／NCT 飾）；性格火爆卻富有義氣的殺手「阿新」（青柳翔 飾）；落魄的前黑道大叔「村雨」（小澤仁志 飾）。原本水火不容的殺手們逐漸被舞蹈的魅力吸引，不知不覺中成了名副其實的「舞林殺手」，一路過關斬將，朝冠軍之路晉級？！
tmdb_overview: 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務，目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，而唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？
tmdb_overview_en: Former assassin Daiya has long left the criminal world, but he decides to take up a mission to kill a rival gang boss for a huge payday. The catch: To kill his target at a talent show, he must go undercover and perform in a pop dance group.

synopsis: ★ 「金獎製造機」A24最新出品，打造史上最抓馬婚禮！ ★ 【夢行者保羅】克里斯多佛博格利自編自導， 前所未有的愛情喜劇新體驗

tmdb_overview: 諭明（張孝全飾）與依庭（林依晨飾）在大學圖書館的「Deep Quiet Room」相識，兩人相愛並走入婚姻，原以為生活將平穩展開，卻在依庭懷孕後，過往的壓力與家庭陰影逐漸浮現，連帶改變了兩人的關係。
tmdb_overview_en: After his pregnant wife Yi-ting unexpectedly committed suicide, Ming decides to take care of his father-in-law, only to find out the unbearable truth of Yi-ting’s family that leads to her death.

tmdb_overview: 1580年，英國。貧困的拉丁語家教威廉莎士比亞遇見自由奔放的艾格妮絲，兩人深受對方吸引，展開一段熾熱戀情，並迅速步入婚姻，與三個孩子過著幸福的生活。但當遠在倫敦的威廉戲劇事業迅速發展之際，艾格妮絲卻必須獨自撐起他們的家庭。突如其來的悲劇，讓這對夫妻曾經堅不可摧的羈絆就此受到嚴峻考驗，而這段經歷，也造就了莎士比亞的不朽傑作────〈哈姆雷特〉。
tmdb_overview_en: The powerful story of love and loss that inspired the creation of Shakespeare's timeless masterpiece, Hamlet.

synopsis: ★ 2025 全州國際影展 韓國競賽單元四項大獎得主 《3670》描寫一名來到首爾生活的北韓脫北青年，在兩種身分之間尋找歸屬的故事。由導演朴俊浩自編自導，本片聚焦同時身為「脫北者」與「同志」的年輕男子哲俊，在南韓社會努力適應新生活的同時，首次踏入首爾的同志社群，並在友情與情感連結之中，逐漸尋得能夠卸下防備的片刻。然而，當他試圖維繫彼此分離的兩個世界，脆弱建立的關係也開始產生裂痕。片名《3670》源自韓國同志社群的暗語——「鐘路3街6號出口，7點集合」，象徵一群人在城市角落尋找彼此的方式。
tmdb_overview: 孤立於首爾「大都市的愛情法」邊緣，哲俊的生活屬於脫北者間的小圈圈，更因隱藏的性向而總感到格格不入。在鼓起勇氣參加了一場聯誼後，他意外踏入另一個屬於同志的社群，更認識了另一名少年永准，開啟了未曾有過的新生活。然而，無論是北緯38度線上的思鄉遠眺，或在鐘路三街裡的情愫暗湧，人人都得面對自己反覆繞著轉的圈圈，困於跳脫或停留的取捨抉擇中……
tmdb_overview_en: Despite the close bonds among fellow defectors, Cheol-jun—a young North Korean defector—felt isolated while hiding his gay identity. Finally, he takes his first step into South Korea's vibrant gay community and forms close ties after meeting Yeong-jun at a casual gathering. Yet, a trivial misunderstanding shatters these fragile bonds.

movie_title: (英) 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
tmdb_title_local: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
tmdb_overview: Having thwarted Bowser's previous plot to marry Princess Peach, Mario and Luigi now face a fresh threat in Bowser Jr., who is determined to liberate his father from captivity and restore the family legacy. Alongside companions new and old, the brothers travel across the stars to stop the young heir's crusade.
tmdb_overview_en: Having thwarted Bowser's previous plot to marry Princess Peach, Mario and Luigi now face a fresh threat in Bowser Jr., who is determined to liberate his father from captivity and restore the family legacy. Alongside companions new and old, the brothers travel across the stars to stop the young heir's crusade.

synopsis: 個性執著的送書人卡爾，生活就像鐘錶一樣地精準。每天，他踩著相同的步伐，將一本本包裝好的書，親手送到忠實顧客的家門口。他了解鎮上每個顧客的喜好，並以能為他們挑選到最合適的書而感到自豪。 有天，卡爾井然有序的生活卻突然遭人闖入。9歲的莎莎剛從失去母親悲傷走出來，決定加入卡爾的送書人小組。她不僅從送書和閱讀中找到慰藉，獨特的人生觀也幫卡爾敞開了心扉，一段意想不到的友誼就此展開。 一場突如其來的變故，讓卡爾失去了工作。原本熱鬧、充滿書香的小鎮也逐漸走向沉寂。就在顧客逐漸散落之際，莎莎決定靠自己最相信的力量：好書的魔力，能讓人們再次團聚一起。她與卡爾攜手合作，不僅為讀者們，也為他們自己，帶來了意義深遠的正面改變。 電影預告 其他熱映
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

synopsis: ★ 2024 坎城影展 主競賽單元、2024 聖保羅國際影展 最佳國際影片、2024 多倫多影展 特別貢獻獎 21世紀前二十一年，一位中國女性沉默著經歷了喧囂的生活。巧巧，中國北方城市大同的野模特兒。她的男友斌哥，一個無所事事的男人。大同，是一座煤礦城市。他們在大同相愛，整天遊蕩、盡情歌舞。生活猶如一場盛大狂歡，剛至高潮，卻已曲終人散。巧巧踏上旅程，尋找失落的愛人。在漫長的時空之旅中，她始終沉默不語。本片從 2001 年開始拍攝，也經歷了二十二年的時空之旅。
tmdb_overview: 千禧年初，巧巧在大同舞廳隨著一曲熱浪起步，她與浪子斌哥貼身共舞，男子口口聲聲要闖天涯，轉身卻只留一封簡訊道別。音訊斷絕後，巧巧背上舊背包沿鐵道南下：礦區下崗潮席捲街巷，高鐵銀弧割開稻浪，三峽蓄水吞沒故里石階。廣州夜店旋燈映出她疲憊目光，口罩下的呼吸在空城夜裡迴盪，沉默成為她量度國土脈動的刻度，愛情是唯一指北，腳步始未停歇。
tmdb_overview_en: Years after her boyfriend left her for the big city and promised to bring her there after he’s settled down, a Chinese woman sets out on a journey to be reunited with him.

synopsis: ★ 榮獲威尼斯影展國際影評人費比西獎、馬斯楚安尼獎等六項大獎 ★ 榮獲芝加哥國際影展 銀雨果獎最佳攝影獎 ★榮獲Silver Spike國際影展銀穗獎與綠穗獎 ★ 榮獲里斯本影展 評審團特別獎 德國一座中世紀大學城的植物園中，一棵古老的銀杏樹靜靜矗立著。這個沉默的見證者，見證著三個時代中、人們與自然之間的深層聯結。

Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected.
